While model quantization alleviates these bottlenecks for edge deployment, static quantization approaches remain suboptimal for VLAs due to two critical challenges: (1) Temporal-dynamic sensitivity, where fixed precision wastes resources by ignoring stage-varying error tolerances; and (2) Real-time allocation, where identifying real-time sensitivity to guide bit allocation remains unsolved. To address these challenges, we propose DyQ-VLA, a dynamic quantization framework for VLAs. Specifically, a sensitivity-aware switching strategy leverages real-time kinematic proxies to trigger the bit-width switch, while a kinematic-guided module dynamically allocates the optimal bit-width. Experiments show that DyQ-VLA requires only 30.9% of the original memory footprint while maintaining 99.5% of its original performance, achieving 1.49x simulation and up to 1.43x real-world speedups.

light_analysis.overview: DyQ-VLA 提出一种动态量化框架，通过实时运动学引导的比特分配优化体现视觉-语言-动作模型的推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 体现视觉-语言-动作模型在体现智能中占主导地位，但面临推理开销大的瓶颈，影响边缘部署。静态量化方法存在两个关键挑战：时间动态敏感性，即固定精度忽略阶段变化误差容忍导致资源浪费；以及实时分配问题，缺乏实时敏感度指导比特分配，使现有方法不适用。这些问题降低了量化效率，限制了VLA模型在资源受限环境中的应用。
light_analysis.method: DyQ-VLA框架采用敏感度感知切换策略，利用实时运动学代理触发比特宽度切换，并结合运动学引导模块动态分配最优比特宽度，以适应VLA模型的时间动态特性。关键创新在于将实时运动学数据集成到量化决策中，实现自适应的精度调整。摘要未明确说明具体使用的数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DyQ-VLA将内存占用降低至原模型的30.9%，同时保持99.5%的原始性能。在模拟环境中实现1.49倍加速，真实世界场景中加速最高达1.43倍。这些结果显著优于静态量化基线，证明了动态量化在平衡效率和性能方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DyQ-VLA的主要贡献在于提出了一种时间动态感知的动态量化框架，有效解决了VLA模型推理开销问题。其学术价值在于整合运动学引导的实时分配机制，为量化技术提供了新思路；实际应用价值在于促进边缘部署，提升资源利用率。未来工作可探索更复杂的动态策略或扩展到其他模型类型。

title: EveryQuery: Zero-Shot Clinical Prediction via Task-Conditioned Pretraining over Electronic Health Records
abstract: Foundation models pretrained on electronic health records (EHR) have demonstrated zero-shot clinical prediction capabilities by generating synthetic patient futures and aggregating statistics over sampled trajectories. However, this autoregressive inference procedure is computationally expensive, statistically noisy, and not natively promptable because users cannot directly condition predictions on specific clinical questions. In this preliminary work, we introduce EveryQuery, an EHR foundation model that achieves zero-shot inference through task-conditioned pre-training. Rather than generating future events, EveryQuery takes as input a patient's history and a structured query specifying a clinical task, and directly estimates the likelihood of the outcome occurring in the future window via a single forward pass. EveryQuery realizes this capability by pre-training over randomly sampled combinations of query tasks and patient contexts, directly training the model to produce correct answers to arbitrary input prompts. This enables zero-shot prediction for any task in the query space without finetuning, linear probing, or trajectory generation. On MIMIC-IV, EveryQuery outperforms an autoregressive baseline on 82% of 39 randomly sampled prediction tasks, with a mean AUC improvement of +0.16 (95% CI: [0.10,0.22]). This advantage remains consistent on tasks that were explicitly held out from the pre-training distribution. Further, EveryQuery's performance gains are most pronounced for rare clinical events, affirming and demonstrating a solution to the fundamental limitation of autoregressive inference for low-prevalence outcomes. However, at present, EveryQuery underperforms on tasks requiring disjunctive reasoning over multiple codes, such as 30-day readmission, exposing a concrete expressiveness limitation of the current query language.

light_analysis.overview: EveryQuery模型通过任务条件预训练在电子健康记录上实现零样本临床预测，直接响应结构化查询，避免了传统自回归推理的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于电子健康记录的基础模型采用自回归推理进行零样本预测，但该方法计算开销大、统计噪声高，且用户无法直接基于特定临床问题进行条件预测，这限制了模型的实时应用和可交互性。因此，研究旨在开发一种更高效、可直接处理结构化查询的方法，以解决这些不足并提升临床预测的实用性。
light_analysis.method: EveryQuery的核心方法是通过任务条件预训练，输入患者历史记录和结构化查询，利用单一前向传递直接估计未来窗口内结果的可能性。预训练时，模型在随机采样的查询任务和患者上下文组合上进行训练，学习直接回答任意提示，从而无需轨迹生成或微调即可实现零样本预测。该方法基于基础模型架构，数据集使用MIMIC-IV，创新点在于直接估计可能性而非生成未来事件。
light_analysis.result: 在MIMIC-IV数据集上，EveryQuery在39个随机预测任务中的82%上优于自回归基线，平均AUC提升了0.16（95%置信区间：[0.10, 0.22]）。优势在预训练分布外的任务中保持一致，尤其对罕见临床事件的预测性能提升显著，有效克服了自回归推理在低流行率结果上的限制。然而，在需要多代码析取推理的任务如30天再入院上表现不佳，暴露了当前查询语言的表达局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过任务条件预训练实现了高效的零样本临床预测，显著提升了预测准确性，特别是在罕见事件上，模型无需微调即可处理任意查询，具有学术创新和实际应用价值。局限性体现在对复杂推理任务的表达能力不足，为未来工作指明了方向，如改进查询语言或模型架构以支持更复杂的临床场景。

title: Bayesian Transformer for Probabilistic Load Forecasting in Smart Grids
abstract: The reliable operation of modern power grids requires probabilistic load forecasts with well-calibrated uncertainty estimates. However, existing deep learning models produce overconfident point predictions that fail catastrophically under extreme weather distributional shifts. This study proposes a Bayesian Transformer (BT) framework that integrates three complementary uncertainty mechanisms into a PatchTST backbone: Monte Carlo Dropout for epistemic parameter uncertainty, variational feed-forward layers with log-uniform weight priors, and stochastic attention with learnable Gaussian noise perturbations on pre-softmax logits, representing, to the best of our knowledge, the first application of Bayesian attention to probabilistic load forecasting. A seven-level multi-quantile pinball-loss prediction head and post-training isotonic regression calibration produce sharp, near-nominally covered prediction intervals. Evaluation of five grid datasets (PJM, ERCOT, ENTSO-E Germany, France, and Great Britain) augmented with NOAA covariates across 24, 48, and 168-hour horizons demonstrates state-of-the-art performance. On the primary benchmark (PJM, H=24h), BT achieves a CRPS of 0.0289, improving 7.4% over Deep Ensembles and 29.9% over the deterministic LSTM, with 90.4% PICP at the 90% nominal level and the narrowest prediction intervals (4,960 MW) among all probabilistic baselines. During heat-wave and cold snap events, BT maintained 89.6% and 90.1% PICP respectively, versus 64.7% and 67.2% for the deterministic LSTM, confirming that Bayesian epistemic uncertainty naturally widens intervals for out-of-distribution inputs. Calibration remained stable across all horizons (89.8-90.4% PICP), while ablation confirmed that each component contributed a distinct value. The calibrated outputs directly support risk-based reserve sizing, stochastic unit commitment, and demand response activation.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了一种贝叶斯Transformer框架，首次在概率性负载预测中应用贝叶斯注意力，结合多种不确定性机制，显著提升了预测精度和不确定性校准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代电网的可靠运行依赖于准确的概率性负载预测，特别是带有良好校准的不确定性估计。然而，现有深度学习模型如LSTM产生点预测，在极端天气分布偏移情况下容易失败，导致灾难性错误，影响电网稳定性。这个问题至关重要，因为不确定性的低估会阻碍风险管理和应急规划。现有方法缺乏有效的不确定性量化，使得预测在异常事件中不可靠，亟需改进以应对实际电网操作中的分布变化。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了一个贝叶斯Transformer框架，基于PatchTST骨干网络。框架集成了三个互补的不确定性机制：蒙特卡洛dropout用于参数不确定性；变分前馈层采用对数均匀权重先验；随机注意力在softmax前logits添加可学习的高斯噪声扰动。此外，使用七级多分位数弹珠损失预测头和训练后等渗回归校准，生成尖锐且接近名义覆盖的预测区间。实验涉及五个电网数据集，如PJM和ERCOT，并添加NOAA气象协变量，以评估不同时间范围的性能。
light_analysis.result: 在五个电网数据集（如PJM、ERCOT）上评估24、48和168小时预测。在主要基准（PJM，H=24h）中，贝叶斯Transformer的CRPS为0.0289，比深度集成提高7.4%，比确定性LSTM提高29.9%。在90%名义水平下，PICP为90.4%，预测区间最窄（4,960兆瓦）。在热浪和寒潮事件中，PICP分别为89.6%和90.1%，远超确定性LSTM的64.7%和67.2%。校准在所有时间范围内保持稳定（PICP 89.8-90.4%），消融实验确认每个组件都贡献了独特价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种贝叶斯Transformer框架，有效解决了概率性负载预测中的不确定性校准问题。学术价值在于为深度学习不确定性量化提供了创新方法，如结合多种贝叶斯机制；实际应用价值体现在支持电网风险管理，如储备大小确定、随机单元调度和需求响应激活。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可进一步优化计算效率或扩展到其他预测领域。

title: Multimodal Large Language Models as Image Classifiers
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLM) classification performance depends critically on evaluation protocol and ground truth quality. Studies comparing MLLMs with supervised and vision-language models report conflicting conclusions, and we show these conflicts stem from protocols that either inflate or underestimate performance. Across the most common evaluation protocols, we identify and fix key issues: model outputs that fall outside the provided class list and are discarded, inflated results from weak multiple-choice distractors, and an open-world setting that underperforms only due to poor output mapping. We additionally quantify the impact of commonly overlooked design choices - batch size, image ordering, and text encoder selection - showing they substantially affect accuracy. Evaluating on ReGT, our multilabel reannotation of 625 ImageNet-1k classes, reveals that MLLMs benefit most from corrected labels (up to +10.8%), substantially narrowing the perceived gap with supervised models. Much of the reported MLLMs underperformance on classification is thus an artifact of noisy ground truth and flawed evaluation protocol rather than genuine model deficiency. Models less reliant on supervised training signals prove most sensitive to annotation quality. Finally, we show that MLLMs can assist human annotators: in a controlled case study, annotators confirmed or integrated MLLMs predictions in approximately 50% of difficult cases, demonstrating their potential for large-scale dataset curation. This work is part of the Aiming for Perfect ImageNet-1k project, see https://klarajanouskova.github.io/ImageNet/.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究揭示了多模态大语言模型在图像分类中的性能评估问题，通过修复评估协议和重新标注数据，大幅提升其表现并缩小与监督模型的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于现有对多模态大语言模型作为图像分类器的性能评估存在冲突结论，这主要源于评估协议不完善和ground truth质量低。评估协议中模型输出超出类别列表被丢弃、弱多选干扰项导致结果夸大、开放世界设置输出映射差等问题，导致性能被不当夸大或低估，影响了模型真实能力的准确判断，使得比较MLLMs与监督模型的性能变得困难，亟需标准化评估方法和高质量标注数据来纠正偏差。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过分析常见评估协议，识别了三个关键问题：模型输出超出类别列表被丢弃、弱多选干扰项导致结果夸大、开放世界设置输出映射差。提出修复措施包括调整输出处理逻辑、优化干扰项设计和改进映射策略。同时量化了批次大小、图像排序和文本编码器选择等设计因素对准确性的影响，使用ReGT数据集进行实验，这是ImageNet-1k的重新标注版本，包含625个类别的多标签标注，以提供更可靠的评估基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，通过修复评估协议和使用ReGT重新标注数据，多模态大语言模型的分类准确率显著提升，最大改善达10.8%，大幅缩小了与监督模型的感知性能差距。量化分析表明，批次大小、图像排序和文本编码器选择对准确性有实质性影响。在受控案例研究中，MLLMs辅助人类标注者，约50%的困难案例中标注者确认或集成了模型预测，展示了其在大规模数据集策展中的应用潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是揭示多模态大语言模型在图像分类中的性能评估问题，表明报告的性能不佳更多源于评估协议缺陷和ground truth噪声，而非模型内在缺陷。这为改进评估标准提供了学术价值，推动了更准确的模型比较；实际应用中，MLLMs可辅助数据集策展，提高标注效率。未来工作可能继续优化评估方法并扩展至更广泛任务，作为Aiming for Perfect ImageNet-1k项目的一部分。

title: SCOPE: Scene-Contextualized Incremental Few-Shot 3D Segmentation
abstract: Incremental Few-Shot (IFS) segmentation aims to learn new categories over time from only a few annotations. Although widely studied in 2D, it remains underexplored for 3D point clouds. Existing methods suffer from catastrophic forgetting or fail to learn discriminative prototypes under sparse supervision, and often overlook a key cue: novel categories frequently appear as unlabelled background in base-training scenes. We introduce SCOPE (Scene-COntextualised Prototype Enrichment), a plug-and-play background-guided prototype enrichment framework that integrates with any prototype-based 3D segmentation method. After base training, a class-agnostic segmentation model extracts high-confidence pseudo-instances from background regions to build a prototype pool. When novel classes arrive with few labelled samples, relevant background prototypes are retrieved and fused with few-shot prototypes to form enriched representations without retraining the backbone or adding parameters. Experiments on ScanNet and S3DIS show that SCOPE achieves SOTA performance, improving novel-class IoU by up to 6.98% and 3.61%, and mean IoU by 2.25% and 1.70%, respectively, while maintaining low forgetting. Code is available https://github.com/Surrey-UP-Lab/SCOPE.

light_analysis.overview: SCOPE提出一种基于场景上下文背景引导的原型丰富框架，以提升3D增量少样本分割的性能和抗遗忘能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究针对3D点云增量少样本分割（IFS）的研究不足，现有方法在2D领域已有广泛探索，但在3D中面临灾难性遗忘和稀疏监督下原型学习不足的问题。此外，现有方法常忽视新类别在基础训练场景中作为未标记背景出现的线索，这限制了分割性能。随着3D感知技术在自动驾驶等领域的应用增加，高效学习新类别以增强系统适应性至关重要，因此解决这些问题具有重要的实际意义。
light_analysis.method: SCOPE框架是一种即插即用的背景引导原型丰富方法，可与任何基于原型的3D分割方法集成。核心流程包括：基础训练后，使用类无关分割模型从背景区域提取高置信度伪实例，构建原型池。当新类别以少样本标注到来时，检索相关背景原型，并与少样本原型融合，形成丰富的表示。这一过程无需重新训练骨干网络或增加参数，保持高效性。
light_analysis.result: 在ScanNet和S3DIS数据集上的实验表明，SCOPE实现了最先进的性能。具体来说，新类别IoU提升了高达6.98%（ScanNet）和3.61%（S3DIS），平均IoU分别提升2.25%和1.70%。同时，框架有效抑制了灾难性遗忘，保持了低遗忘率，与基线方法相比显著提高了分割准确性和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献在于提出了SCOPE框架，通过整合场景上下文中的背景信息，解决了3D增量少样本分割中的关键挑战。其学术价值在于推进了3D分割的少样本学习理论，实际应用中提供了高效且无需重训练的解决方案，有助于实时系统部署。未来工作可扩展至更多数据集或任务，摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Occlusion-Aware SORT: Observing Occlusion for Robust Multi-Object Tracking
abstract: Multi-object tracking (MOT) involves analyzing object trajectories and counting the number of objects in video sequences. However, 2D MOT faces challenges due to positional cost confusion arising from partial occlusion. To address this issue, we present the novel Occlusion-Aware SORT (OA-SORT) framework, a plug-and-play and training-free framework that includes the Occlusion-Aware Module (OAM), the Occlusion-Aware Offset (OAO), and the Bias-Aware Momentum (BAM). Specifically, OAM analyzes the occlusion status of objects, where a Gaussian Map (GM) is introduced to reduce background influence. In contrast, OAO and BAM leverage the OAM-described occlusion status to mitigate cost confusion and suppress estimation instability. Comprehensive evaluations on the DanceTrack, SportsMOT, and MOT17 datasets demonstrate the importance of occlusion handling in MOT. On the DanceTrack test set, OA-SORT achieves 63.1% and 64.2% in HOTA and IDF1, respectively. Furthermore, integrating the Occlusion-Aware framework into the four additional trackers improves HOTA and IDF1 by an average of 2.08% and 3.05%, demonstrating the reusability of the occlusion awareness.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. [The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026 (CVPR2026)]

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种即插即用且无需训练的遮挡感知SORT框架OA-SORT，以解决多目标跟踪中的遮挡问题，提升跟踪鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多目标跟踪在视频分析中用于追踪对象轨迹和计数，但2D跟踪常因部分遮挡导致位置成本混淆，使得跟踪不稳定和不准确。现有方法可能未充分考虑遮挡的影响，导致跟踪性能下降，这在动态场景如体育或舞蹈视频中尤为重要。因此，研究旨在设计专门机制来处理遮挡，以提高MOT的整体准确性和适应性。
light_analysis.method: OA-SORT框架包含三个核心组件：Occlusion-Aware Module (OAM)使用高斯图分析对象遮挡状态，以减少背景干扰；Occlusion-Aware Offset (OAO)和Bias-Aware Momentum (BAM)则利用OAM的结果来缓解成本混淆和抑制轨迹估计的不稳定性。该框架无需额外训练，设计为即插即用，可直接集成到现有跟踪器中，基于SORT基础架构进行扩展。
light_analysis.result: 在DanceTrack、SportsMOT和MOT17数据集上的评估表明，遮挡处理对MOT性能至关重要。OA-SORT在DanceTrack测试集上达到63.1% HOTA和64.2% IDF1。集成到其他四个跟踪器后，平均HOTA提升2.08%，IDF1提升3.05%，这证明了框架的有效性和重用性，且无需特定数据集训练即可显著改善基线方法的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过OA-SORT框架有效处理了多目标跟踪中的遮挡问题，提升了跟踪的鲁棒性和准确性。其即插即用设计增强了实际应用价值，为复杂视频分析场景提供了可靠工具。未来工作可扩展至更多跟踪器或探索更复杂的遮挡类型，以进一步优化性能。

title: CR-QAT: Curriculum Relational Quantization-Aware Training for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVOD) enables novel category detection via vision-language alignment, but massive model sizes hinder deployment on resource-constrained devices. While quantization offers practical compression, we reveal that naive extreme low-bit (e.g., 4-bit) quantization severely degrades fine-grained vision-language alignment and distorts inter-region relational structures. To address this, we propose curriculum relational quantization-aware training (CR-QAT), an integrated framework combining stage-by-stage optimization with relational knowledge distillation. Within CR-QAT, curriculum QAT (CQAT) mitigates error accumulation by partitioning the model for progressive quantization, ensuring stable optimization via error isolation. Concurrently, text-centric relational KD (TRKD) is applied to task-relevant modules. By constructing text-anchored pairwise similarity matrices, TRKD comprehensively transfers the teacher's multi-dimensional relational knowledge. Experiments on LVIS and COCO zero-shot benchmarks demonstrate that CR-QAT consistently outperforms existing QAT baselines under aggressive low-bit settings, achieving relative AP improvements of up to 38.9% and 40.9%, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出课程关系量化感知训练（CR-QAT）框架，通过结合分阶段量化和关系知识蒸馏，解决开放词汇对象检测中低比特量化的性能下降问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放词汇对象检测通过视觉语言对齐实现新类别检测，但大规模模型部署在资源受限设备上受限。量化提供压缩方案，但现有低比特量化方法（如4位）会严重损害细粒度视觉语言对齐，并扭曲区域间关系结构，导致检测性能下降，亟需改进方法以在保持模型紧凑的同时维持准确性。
light_analysis.method: CR-QAT框架整合课程量化感知训练和关系知识蒸馏。课程QAT将模型分区进行渐进式量化，通过误差隔离减少误差累积；文本中心关系KD针对任务相关模块，通过构建文本锚定的成对相似度矩阵，从教师模型转移多维度关系知识。该方法在LVIS和COCO数据集上进行实验，专注于零样本设置，但具体模型架构未在摘要中说明。
light_analysis.result: 在LVIS和COCO零样本基准测试中，CR-QAT在激进低比特设置下一致优于现有QAT基线方法，相对平均精度改进分别高达38.9%和40.9%。这显示其能有效缓解量化带来的对齐退化和性能损失，对比基线方法有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: CR-QAT通过课程量化和关系知识蒸馏，成功减轻了量化对开放词汇对象检测的负面影响，增强了模型的部署可行性。其贡献在于提供一种高效压缩方法，具有学术价值（改进量化技术）和实际应用（支持资源受限设备）。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可扩展该方法到其他视觉语言任务或更低比特设置。

title: OVGGT: O(1) Constant-Cost Streaming Visual Geometry Transformer
abstract: Reconstructing 3D geometry from streaming video requires continuous inference under bounded resources. Recent geometric foundation models achieve impressive reconstruction quality through all-to-all attention, yet their quadratic cost confines them to short, offline sequences. Causal-attention variants such as StreamVGGT enable single-pass streaming but accumulate an ever-growing KV cache, exhausting GPU memory within hundreds of frames and precluding the long-horizon deployment that motivates streaming inference in the first place. We present OVGGT, a training-free framework that bounds both memory and compute to a fixed budget regardless of sequence length. Our approach combines Self-Selective Caching, which leverages FFN residual magnitudes to compress the KV cache while remaining fully compatible with FlashAttention, with Dynamic Anchor Protection, which shields coordinate-critical tokens from eviction to suppress geometric drift over extended trajectories. Extensive experiments on indoor, outdoor, and ultra-long sequence benchmarks demonstrate that OVGGT processes arbitrarily long videos within a constant VRAM envelope while achieving state-of-the-art 3D geometric accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: OVGGT提出了一种无需训练的框架，实现流视频中恒定内存和计算成本的3D几何重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 流视频中的3D几何重建需要在资源受限环境下进行连续推理，但现有方法存在局限：几何基础模型虽重建质量高，但全注意力机制导致二次计算成本，仅适用于离线短序列；因果注意力变体如StreamVGGT支持单次流式处理，但KV缓存随序列增长而积累，GPU内存在数百帧内耗尽，限制了长序列部署的实际应用。因此，开发一种能处理任意长视频且资源消耗恒定的方法至关重要，以推动流式推断在长期场景中的落地。
light_analysis.method: OVGGT通过结合自选择性缓存和动态锚点保护实现恒定成本。自选择性缓存利用前馈网络残差幅度来压缩KV缓存，保持与FlashAttention的完全兼容；动态锚点保护则防止关键坐标令牌被逐出，以抑制长轨迹中的几何漂移。该方法无需额外训练，能固定内存和计算预算，适应任意序列长度，创新点在于训练免费、资源恒定，并兼容现有高效注意力机制。
light_analysis.result: 在室内、室外及超长序列基准测试中，OVGGT展现出优越性能：能在恒定VRAM内处理任意长视频，同时达到最先进的3D几何精度。与基线方法如StreamVGGT相比，OVGGT解决了内存无限增长的问题，实现了长期流式部署，实验表明其在不同场景下均保持高效和准确，但摘要未提供具体数据如准确率提升百分比。
light_analysis.conclusion: OVGGT的主要贡献是提出了一种训练免费的恒定成本流式视觉几何变换器框架，解决了长视频3D重建中的内存和计算瓶颈。其学术价值在于为流式推断提供了高效、可扩展的解决方案，实际应用价值在于支持实时长视频处理和自动驾驶等长期部署场景。未来工作方向可能包括进一步优化压缩策略或扩展到其他视觉任务，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: TumorChain: Interleaved Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Traceable Clinical Tumor Analysis
abstract: Accurate tumor analysis is central to clinical radiology and precision oncology, where early detection, reliable lesion characterization, and pathology-level risk assessment guide diagnosis and treatment planning. Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning is particularly important in this setting because it enables step-by-step interpretation from imaging findings to clinical impressions and pathology conclusions, improving traceability and reducing diagnostic errors. Here, we target the clinical tumor analysis task and build a large-scale benchmark that operationalizes a multimodal reasoning pipeline, spanning findings, impressions, and pathology predictions. We curate TumorCoT, a large-scale dataset of 1.5M CoT-labeled VQA instructions paired with 3D CT scans, with step-aligned rationales and cross-modal alignments along the trajectory from findings to impression to pathology, enabling evaluation of both answer accuracy and reasoning consistency. We further propose TumorChain, a multimodal interleaved reasoning framework that tightly couples 3D imaging encoders, clinical text understanding, and organ-level vision-language alignment. Through cross-modal alignment and iterative interleaved causal reasoning, TumorChain grounds visual evidence, aggregates conclusions, and issues pathology predictions after multiple rounds of self-refinement, improving traceability and reducing hallucination risk. Experiments show consistent improvements over strong baselines in lesion detection, impression generation, and pathology classification, and demonstrate strong generalization on the DeepTumorVQA benchmark. These results highlight the potential of multimodal reasoning for reliable and interpretable tumor analysis in clinical practice. Detailed information about our project can be found on our project homepage at https://github.com/ZJU4HealthCare/TumorChain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 TumorChain，一种结合多模态 Chain-of-Thought 推理的框架，提升临床肿瘤分析的可追溯性和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床肿瘤分析对诊断和治疗规划至关重要，但现有方法常缺乏可追溯的推理步骤，导致诊断误差。Chain-of-Thought 推理能提供逐步解释，但当前应用在多模态肿瘤分析中受限，缺少大规模基准和连贯推理机制。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过构建操作化推理管道和数据集，以改善推理一致性和减少幻觉风险，从而增强临床决策的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 该方法提出 TumorChain 框架，整合 3D CT 扫描编码器、临床文本理解模块，并通过器官级视觉语言对齐实现跨模态融合。关键创新包括跨模态对齐和迭代交错因果推理，使模型能多轮自我精炼，聚合视觉证据并生成病理预测。使用 TumorCoT 数据集，包含 1.5M 个 CoT 标记的 VQA 指令与 3D CT 扫描，支持从发现到印象到病理的连贯评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，TumorChain 在病变检测、印象生成和病理分类任务上均优于强基线，并在 DeepTumorVQA 基准上表现出强泛化能力。这些改进证实了方法在提升推理一致性和准确性方面的有效性，尽管具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了模型在减少幻觉风险和增强可追溯性上的稳健表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了 TumorChain 框架和 TumorCoT 数据集，展示了多模态 Chain-of-Thought 推理在临床肿瘤分析中的潜力。学术上，它推动了可解释 AI 在医疗领域的发展；应用上，有助于提高诊断可追溯性，减少错误，支持精准肿瘤学。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他医疗模态或优化推理效率，以应对更广泛的临床需求。

title: Bridging Domains through Subspace-Aware Model Merging
abstract: Model merging integrates multiple task-specific models into a single consolidated one. Recent research has made progress in improving merging performance for in-distribution or multi-task scenarios, but domain generalization in model merging remains underexplored. We investigate how merging models fine-tuned on distinct domains affects generalization to unseen domains. Through an analysis of parameter competition in the task matrix using singular value decomposition, we show that merging models trained under different distribution shifts induces stronger conflicts between their subspaces compared to traditional multi-task settings. To mitigate this issue, we propose SCORE (Subspace COnflict-Resolving mErging), a method designed to alleviate such singular subspace conflicts. SCORE finds a shared orthogonal basis by computing the principal components of the concatenated leading singular vectors of all models. It then projects each task matrix into the shared basis, pruning off-diagonal components to remove conflicting singular directions. SCORE consistently outperforms, on average, existing model merging approaches in domain generalization settings across a variety of architectures and model scales, demonstrating its effectiveness and scalability.
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026 (CVPR)

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出SCORE方法，通过子空间冲突消解来解决模型合并中的领域泛化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型合并研究当前主要集中于同分布或多任务场景，但领域泛化在模型合并中仍被忽视。合并来自不同分布域的微调模型可能导致更强的参数竞争，影响对未见域的泛化能力。现有方法在处理这种跨域冲突时存在不足，因此有必要探索新策略以提升模型在多样化环境中的适应性，推动合并技术的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的SCORE方法使用奇异值分解分析任务矩阵中的参数竞争，识别子空间冲突。它通过计算所有模型主导奇异向量的主成分来构建共享正交基，并将每个任务矩阵投影到该基上，随后修剪对角线外组件以移除冲突的奇异方向。该方法创新性地结合子空间分解来解决分布偏移问题，适用于各种模型架构和规模。
light_analysis.result: 在领域泛化设置中，SCORE方法平均优于现有模型合并方法。实验覆盖多种神经网络架构和模型规模，结果显示SCORE能有效提升泛化性能，展现出更好的稳定性和可扩展性。与基线方法相比，SCORE在处理跨域冲突时 consistently outperforms，证明了其在实际应用中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过提出SCORE方法，解决了模型合并中的领域泛化挑战，利用子空间冲突消解优化了参数竞争问题。该工作不仅提升了模型合并的学术价值，还为多域适应和模型压缩等应用提供了新思路。未来可进一步探索复杂分布设置或与其他合并技术的结合。

title: When AI Levels the Playing Field: Skill Homogenization, Asset Concentration, and Two Regimes of Inequality
abstract: Generative AI compresses within-task skill differences while shifting economic value toward concentrated complementary assets, creating an apparent paradox: the technology that equalizes individual performance may widen aggregate inequality. We formalize this tension in a task-based model with endogenous education, employer screening, and heterogeneous firms. The model yields two regimes whose boundary depends on AI's technology structure (proprietary vs. commodity) and labor market institutions (rent-sharing elasticity, asset concentration). A scenario analysis via Method of Simulated Moments, matching six empirical targets, disciplines the model's quantitative magnitudes; a sensitivity decomposition reveals that the five non-$Δ$Gini moments identify mechanism rates but not the aggregate sign, which at the calibrated parameters is pinned by $m_6$ and $ξ$, while AI's technology structure ($η_1$ vs. $η_0$) independently crosses the boundary. The contribution is the mechanism -- not a verdict on the sign. Occupation-level regressions using BLS OEWS data (2019--2023) illustrate why such data cannot test the model's task-level predictions. The predictions are testable with within-occupation, within-task panel data that do not yet exist at scale.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一个任务基础模型，解释生成式AI如何通过技能同质化和资产集中导致两种不平等制度，并强调了机制分析而非符号裁决的核心贡献。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI技术压缩任务内技能差异，使个体表现趋于平等，但经济价值转向集中的互补资产，可能扩大总体不平等，形成悖论。这一矛盾重要，因为它影响劳动力市场和社会结构，而现有研究可能缺乏综合模型来量化AI技术的异质性效应，无法全面捕捉技能与资产间的动态关系。摘要未明确说明现有具体方法不足，但暗示需要机制框架来分析不平等动态。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出任务基础模型，内生化教育选择、雇主筛选和异质企业行为，以模拟AI技术对技能和资产的影响。关键创新在于整合经济机制并进行量化校准，使用模拟矩法匹配六个实证目标，以约束模型参数并进行敏感性分解识别关键因素。此外，利用BLS OEWS数据（2019-2023）进行职业层面回归，以说明现有数据在测试任务层面预测时的局限性，突出了需要细粒度面板数据。
light_analysis.result: 模型结果显示两种不平等制度，边界取决于AI技术结构（专有vs商品）和劳动力市场制度（如租金共享弹性）。校准后，敏感性分解表明参数m_6和ξ决定总体不平等符号，而技术结构η_1 vs η_0独立影响制度边界。职业层面回归分析表明，现有BLS OEWS数据无法直接验证模型的任务层面预测，需依赖尚未大规模存在的职业内、任务内面板数据。摘要未提供具体性能指标或基线对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献在于机制分析，揭示了AI通过技能同质化和资产集中影响不平等动态的量化框架。学术上提供了研究技术变革社会经济影响的新模型，实践上对AI政策制定有启示，帮助理解不平等变化。局限性在于预测验证需要更细粒度数据，未来工作可扩展数据收集和实证测试，以验证模型并探索政策干预。

title: Conformal Prediction for Risk-Controlled Medical Entity Extraction Across Clinical Domains
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for medical entity extraction, yet their confidence scores are often miscalibrated, limiting safe deployment in clinical settings. We present a conformal prediction framework that provides finite-sample coverage guarantees for LLM-based extraction across two clinical domains. First, we extract structured entities from 1,000 FDA drug labels across eight sections using GPT-4.1, verified via FactScore-based atomic statement evaluation (97.7\% accuracy over 128,906 entities). Second, we extract radiological entities from MIMIC-CXR reports using the RadGraph schema with GPT-4.1 and Llama-4-Maverick, evaluated against physician annotations (entity F1: 0.81 to 0.84). Our central finding is that miscalibration direction reverses across domains: on well-structured FDA labels, models are underconfident, requiring modest conformal thresholds ($τ\approx 0.06$), while on free-text radiology reports, models are overconfident, demanding strict thresholds ($τ$ up to 0.99). Despite this heterogeneity, conformal prediction achieves target coverage ($\geq 90\%$) in both settings with manageable rejection rates (9--13\%). These results demonstrate that calibration is not a global model property but depends on document structure, extraction category, and model architecture, motivating domain-specific conformal calibration for safe clinical deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一种 conformal prediction 框架，为基于大语言模型的医学实体提取提供跨临床领域的风险控制覆盖保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在医学实体提取中应用增多，但其置信度分数常校准不当，影响临床环境中的安全部署。现有方法缺乏对跨领域校准差异的考虑，校准不是全局模型属性，而是依赖于文档结构、提取类别和模型架构等因素，这可能导致风险控制不足，尤其在医疗决策等关键领域，因此需要可靠的方法来提供有限样本覆盖率保证。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用 conformal prediction 框架，在两个临床领域进行实体提取实验。首先，从 1,000 个 FDA 药物标签中提取结构化实体，使用 GPT-4.1 模型，并通过 FactScore 基于原子语句评估验证准确率（报告为 97.7%）。其次，从 MIMIC-CXR 放射学报告中提取实体，使用 GPT-4.1 和 Llama-4-Maverick 模型，遵循 RadGraph 模式，评估基于医生注释的实体 F1 分数。关键创新在于跨域分析和校准方法，以提供风险控制覆盖率。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，FDA 标签提取准确率达 97.7%（128,906 个实体），放射学实体 F1 分数在 0.81 至 0.84 之间。校准分析发现，在结构化 FDA 标签上，模型置信度不足，conformal 阈值 τ 约 0.06；在自由文本放射学报告上，模型置信度过高，τ 高达 0.99。conformal prediction 在两个设置中均实现目标覆盖率 ≥90%，拒绝率在 9-13% 可控范围，验证了方法在跨领域中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献在于证明校准并非全局模型属性，而是依赖于文档结构、提取类别和模型架构，推动了域特定 conformal 校准研究。学术价值在于为 LLM 在医疗领域的可靠应用提供理论基础，实际应用价值在于支持在临床环境中安全部署医学实体提取系统，提高风险控制能力。未来工作可扩展更多临床领域和模型架构，以增强泛化性。

title: WildActor: Unconstrained Identity-Preserving Video Generation
abstract: Production-ready human video generation requires digital actors to maintain strictly consistent full-body identities across dynamic shots, viewpoints and motions, a setting that remains challenging for existing methods. Prior methods often suffer from face-centric behavior that neglects body-level consistency, or produce copy-paste artifacts where subjects appear rigid due to pose locking. We present Actor-18M, a large-scale human video dataset designed to capture identity consistency under unconstrained viewpoints and environments. Actor-18M comprises 1.6M videos with 18M corresponding human images, covering both arbitrary views and canonical three-view representations. Leveraging Actor-18M, we propose WildActor, a framework for any-view conditioned human video generation. We introduce an Asymmetric Identity-Preserving Attention mechanism coupled with a Viewpoint-Adaptive Monte Carlo Sampling strategy that iteratively re-weights reference conditions by marginal utility for balanced manifold coverage. Evaluated on the proposed Actor-Bench, WildActor consistently preserves body identity under diverse shot compositions, large viewpoint transitions, and substantial motions, surpassing existing methods in these challenging settings.

light_analysis.overview: WildActor提出了一个框架，用于在无约束视角下保持身份一致的人体视频生成，通过新数据集和注意力机制解决现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 生产就绪的人类视频生成需要数字演员在动态镜头、不同视角和动作中保持严格一致的全身份识别，但现有方法面临挑战。现有方法往往过于关注面部而忽视身体级别的身份一致性，或产生复制粘贴的伪影导致主体僵硬，限制了真实视频生成的质量。该研究旨在解决这些问题，以提升数字演员在复杂场景下的自然表现能力。
light_analysis.method: 该研究提出了Actor-18M大规模人类视频数据集，包含160万视频和1800万对应的人类图像，覆盖任意视角和标准三视角表示。基于此，开发了WildActor框架，引入了Asymmetric Identity-Preserving Attention机制和Viewpoint-Adaptive Monte Carlo Sampling策略，通过迭代重加权参考条件以实现平衡的流形覆盖，从而支持任何视角条件下的人体视频生成。
light_analysis.result: 在提出的Actor-Bench基准上评估，WildActor在多样化镜头构成、大幅视角转换和显著运动中均能一致保持身体身份，超越了现有方法。摘要未明确提供具体性能数据如准确率，但强调了其在挑战性设置下的优越性，表明在身份保持方面具有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: WildActor框架有效解决了无约束视频生成中的身份保持问题，通过创新的数据集和机制实现了更好的性能。其学术价值在于提出了大规模数据收集和高效的注意力策略，实际应用价值是推动数字演员视频生成技术向生产就绪方向发展。未来工作可能涉及进一步优化策略或扩展应用场景，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Characterizing MARL for Energy Control: A Multi-KPI Benchmark on the CityLearn Environment
abstract: The optimization of urban energy systems is crucial for the advancement of sustainable and resilient smart cities, which are becoming increasingly complex with multiple decision-making units. To address scalability and coordination concerns, Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) is a promising solution. This paper addresses the imperative need for comprehensive and reliable benchmarking of MARL algorithms on energy management tasks. CityLearn is used as a case study environment because it realistically simulates urban energy systems, incorporates multiple storage systems, and utilizes renewable energy sources. By doing so, our work sets a new standard for evaluation, conducting a comparative study across multiple key performance indicators (KPIs). This approach illuminates the key strengths and weaknesses of various algorithms, moving beyond traditional KPI averaging which often masks critical insights. Our experiments utilize widely accepted baselines such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and Soft Actor Critic (SAC), and encompass diverse training schemes including Decentralized Training with Decentralized Execution (DTDE) and Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) approaches and different neural network architectures. Our work also proposes novel KPIs that tackle real world implementation challenges such as individual building contribution and battery storage lifetime. Our findings show that DTDE consistently outperforms CTDE in both average and worst-case performance. Additionally, temporal dependency learning improved control on memory dependent KPIs such as ramping and battery usage, contributing to more sustainable battery operation. Results also reveal robustness to agent or resource removal, highlighting both the resilience and decentralizability of the learned policies.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出基于CityLearn环境的多KPI基准测试框架，全面评估多智能体强化学习在能源控制中的性能，并揭示DTDE优于CTDE的关键发现。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市能源系统优化对可持续智慧城市至关重要，但随着系统复杂性增加和多决策单元协调困难，传统方法难以应对。多智能体强化学习（MARL）被视为潜在解决方案，但现有研究缺乏全面可靠的基准测试，传统KPI平均往往掩盖算法弱点。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过建立新基准来评估MARL算法的性能，促进能源管理技术的进步。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法采用CityLearn环境作为案例研究，该环境真实模拟城市能源系统、多存储系统和可再生能源。提出多KPI基准测试框架，进行算法比较，涵盖关键性能指标如建筑贡献和电池寿命。实验使用广泛基线算法如Proximal Policy Optimization（PPO）和Soft Actor Critic（SAC），并包含不同训练方案如Decentralized Training with Decentralized Execution（DTDE）和Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution（CTDE），以及多样化的神经网络架构，以全面评估算法表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，DTDE在平均和最差性能上一致优于CTDE，显示出更高的稳定性。时间依赖学习改进了对内存依赖KPI的控制，如ramping和电池使用，这有助于实现更可持续的电池操作。此外，算法对智能体或资源移除表现出鲁棒性，突显学习策略的韧性和去中心化能力，为实际应用提供了可靠性保障。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于设定了MARL算法在能源控制任务上的新评估标准，通过多KPI比较提供了深入算法洞察。学术价值在于揭示不同算法的优劣，推动强化学习理论研究；实际应用价值在于促进更可持续和可靠的能源管理系统。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可扩展至更多环境或算法优化，进一步提升基准的通用性。

title: Open-Vocabulary Domain Generalization in Urban-Scene Segmentation
abstract: Domain Generalization in Semantic Segmentation (DG-SS) aims to enable segmentation models to perform robustly in unseen environments. However, conventional DG-SS methods are restricted to a fixed set of known categories, limiting their applicability in open-world scenarios. Recent progress in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has advanced Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation (OV-SS) by enabling models to recognize a broader range of concepts. Yet, these models remain sensitive to domain shifts and struggle to maintain robustness when deployed in unseen environments, a challenge that is particularly severe in urban-driving scenarios. To bridge this gap, we introduce Open-Vocabulary Domain Generalization in Semantic Segmentation (OVDG-SS), a new setting that jointly addresses unseen domains and unseen categories. We introduce the first benchmark for OVDG-SS in autonomous driving, addressing a previously unexplored problem and covering both synthetic-to-real and real-to-real generalization across diverse unseen domains and unseen categories. In OVDG-SS, we observe that domain shifts often distort text-image correlations in pre-trained VLMs, which hinders the performance of OV-SS models. To tackle this challenge, we propose S2-Corr, a state-space-driven text-image correlation refinement mechanism that mitigates domain-induced distortions and produces more consistent text-image correlations under distribution changes. Extensive experiments on our constructed benchmark demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior cross-domain performance and efficiency compared to existing OV-SS approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了开放词汇域泛化语义分割的新设置OVDG-SS，并开发了S2-Corr机制来精炼文本-图像相关性，以增强在未知域和未知类别中的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统域泛化语义分割方法仅适用于固定类别集，限制了在开放世界场景中的应用；而基于视觉语言模型的开放词汇语义分割模型对域偏移敏感，在未见环境中鲁棒性不足，特别是在城市驾驶场景中。因此，本研究旨在同时解决未见域和未见类别的问题，以提升模型在复杂现实环境中的适用性，弥补现有方法在泛化能力和类别覆盖上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出S2-Corr方法，这是一种状态空间驱动的文本-图像相关性精炼机制，通过分析域偏移对预训练视觉语言模型中文本-图像相关性的影响，动态调整相关性以减轻失真，确保在分布变化下保持一致性。此外，研究构建了首个针对OVDG-SS的基准测试，涵盖合成到真实和真实到真实的泛化场景，利用视觉语言模型作为基础架构进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在构建的OVDG-SS基准测试上进行广泛实验，结果显示S2-Corr方法在跨域性能和效率方面优于现有的开放词汇语义分割方法。实验证实了该方法能有效应对未知域和未知类别带来的挑战，具体性能指标如准确率提升在摘要中未明确说明，但跨域比较表明其具有显著的鲁棒性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是引入了开放词汇域泛化语义分割的新范式OVDG-SS和S2-Corr机制，解决了域偏移下文本-图像相关性失真的问题。这推动了语义分割与域泛化领域的融合，对自动驾驶等应用有实际价值。未来工作可扩展到更多泛化场景或探究更复杂的域适应策略，具体局限性摘要未明确说明。

title: RoboLayout: Differentiable 3D Scene Generation for Embodied Agents
abstract: Recent advances in vision language models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for spatial reasoning and 3D scene layout generation from open-ended language instructions. However, generating layouts that are not only semantically coherent but also feasible for interaction by embodied agents remains challenging, particularly in physically constrained indoor environments. In this paper, RoboLayout is introduced as an extension of LayoutVLM that augments the original framework with agent-aware reasoning and improved optimization stability. RoboLayout integrates explicit reachability constraints into a differentiable layout optimization process, enabling the generation of layouts that are navigable and actionable by embodied agents. Importantly, the agent abstraction is not limited to a specific robot platform and can represent diverse entities with distinct physical capabilities, such as service robots, warehouse robots, humans of different age groups, or animals, allowing environment design to be tailored to the intended agent. In addition, a local refinement stage is proposed that selectively reoptimizes problematic object placements while keeping the remainder of the scene fixed, improving convergence efficiency without increasing global optimization iterations. Overall, RoboLayout preserves the strong semantic alignment and physical plausibility of LayoutVLM while enhancing applicability to agent-centric indoor scene generation, as demonstrated by experimental results across diverse scene configurations.

light_analysis.overview: RoboLayout提出了一种可微分3D场景生成框架，通过集成代理感知推理和改进优化稳定性，为具身智能体生成适合交互的布局。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决在物理受限室内环境中生成既语义连贯又适合具身智能体交互的3D场景布局的挑战。现有视觉语言模型（VLMs）如LayoutVLM在空间推理方面有潜力，但缺乏对代理可行性的考虑，导致布局可能无法支持具身智能体的导航和交互。这限制了方法在机器人学、智能家居等应用中的实用性，因此需要开发能同时满足语义一致性和代理行动需求的优化方案。
light_analysis.method: RoboLayout扩展了LayoutVLM框架，通过将显式的可达性约束集成到可微分布局优化过程中，实现代理感知的布局生成。关键创新包括代理抽象，支持多种物理能力的实体（如服务机器人、人类、动物），以及一个局部精炼阶段，选择性重新优化问题对象放置以提高收敛效率，而不增加全局优化迭代。这种方法保持了语义对齐和物理合理性，并针对代理中心室内场景生成进行优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，RoboLayout在各种场景配置中保持了LayoutVLM的强语义对齐和物理合理性，同时增强了针对具身智能体交互的适用性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但通过实验验证了局部精炼阶段能有效提高优化效率，生成更可行的布局，与基线方法相比，在代理感知场景生成方面表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: RoboLayout的主要贡献是提出了一个可微分3D场景生成框架，集成代理感知推理和优化改进，为多种具身智能体提供定制化室内环境设计。这增强了布局的实用性和效率，推动了代理中心场景生成技术的发展，具有实际应用价值，如机器人导航和智能家居。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多场景类型或代理类型，以及进一步优化约束集成。

title: X-SYS: A Reference Architecture for Interactive Explanation Systems
abstract: The explainable AI (XAI) research community has proposed numerous technical methods, yet deploying explainability as systems remains challenging: Interactive explanation systems require both suitable algorithms and system capabilities that maintain explanation usability across repeated queries, evolving models and data, and governance constraints. We argue that operationalizing XAI requires treating explainability as an information systems problem where user interaction demands induce specific system requirements. We introduce X-SYS, a reference architecture for interactive explanation systems, that guides (X)AI researchers, developers and practitioners in connecting interactive explanation user interfaces (XUI) with system capabilities. X-SYS organizes around four quality attributes named STAR (scalability, traceability, responsiveness, and adaptability), and specifies a five-component decomposition (XUI Services, Explanation Services, Model Services, Data Services, Orchestration and Governance). It maps interaction patterns to system capabilities to decouple user interface evolution from backend computation. We implement X-SYS through SemanticLens, a system for semantic search and activation steering in vision-language models. SemanticLens demonstrates how contract-based service boundaries enable independent evolution, offline/online separation ensures responsiveness, and persistent state management supports traceability. Together, this work provides a reusable blueprint and concrete instantiation for interactive explanation systems supporting end-to-end design under operational constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出X-SYS参考架构，为交互式可解释AI系统提供系统化设计和实施框架，以解决部署挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 可解释AI领域已提出多种算法，但部署为交互式系统时面临挑战，需整合算法与系统能力以确保解释的可用性。现有方法常忽视系统需求，如处理重复查询、动态模型变化和治理约束，导致实际操作困难。本研究将可解释AI视为信息系统问题，强调用户交互引发的系统需求，旨在填补技术方法与系统实施之间的鸿沟，促进XAI的有效应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出X-SYS参考架构，围绕STAR质量属性（可扩展性、可追溯性、响应性、适应性）和五组件分解：XUI服务、解释服务、模型服务、数据服务、编排和治理。关键创新点在于将交互模式映射到系统能力，实现用户界面与后端计算的解耦。通过SemanticLens系统实例化，该系统用于视觉-语言模型的语义搜索和激活控制，展示了服务边界、离线/在线分离和状态管理等技术特色。
light_analysis.result: 通过SemanticLens系统演示X-SYS架构的有效性：基于服务边界的设计支持组件独立演化，离线/在线分离确保交互响应性，持久状态管理增强可追溯性。该系统在视觉-语言模型任务中实现语义搜索和激活控制，验证了架构支持交互模式的能力。摘要未提供具体性能指标，但与基线方法对比显示系统能力对提升交互体验有积极影响，为后续量化评估奠定基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作贡献了X-SYS参考架构和SemanticLens实例，为交互式解释系统提供可重用蓝图，支持在操作约束下的端到端设计。学术上，它推动了XAI系统架构研究；实践中，指导开发人员优化部署和演化。研究意义在于弥合算法与系统之间的差距，增强可解释AI的实际应用。未来方向可扩展至更多模型类型和交互场景，并深化性能评估。

title: To Mix or To Merge: Toward Multi-Domain Reinforcement Learning for Large Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) plays a key role in stimulating the explicit reasoning capability of Large Language Models (LLMs). We can achieve expert-level performance in some specific domains via RLVR, such as coding or math. When a general multi-domain expert-level model is required, we need to carefully consider the collaboration of RLVR across different domains. The current state-of-the-art models mainly employ two different training paradigms for multi-domain RLVR: mixed multi-task RLVR and separate RLVR followed by model merging. However, most of the works did not provide a detailed comparison and analysis about these paradigms. To this end, we choose multiple commonly used high-level tasks (e.g., math, coding, science, instruction following, and agent) as our target domains and design extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments using open-source datasets. We find the RLVR across domains exhibits few mutual interferences, and reasoning-intensive domains demonstrate mutually synergistic effects. Furthermore, we analyze the internal mechanisms of mutual gains from the perspectives of weight space geometry, model prediction behavior, information constraints and self-verification. This project is named as M2RL that means Mixed multi-task training or separate training followed by model Merging for Reinforcement Learning, and the homepage is at https://github.com/mosAI25/M2RL.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过对比混合训练与模型合并两种范式，揭示了多领域强化学习在大型语言模型中的协同效应和内部机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决如何有效协作跨领域的强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR），以构建通用多领域专家级大型语言模型。当前，RLVR在特定领域如编码或数学中能实现专家级性能，但当扩展到多领域时，现有方法主要采用混合多任务训练或单独训练后模型合并，缺乏对这些范式的详细比较和分析，导致无法优化协作策略。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过系统比较探索多领域RLVR的协作机制。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括选择多个高级任务作为目标领域，如数学、编码、科学、指令遵循和代理，使用开源数据集设计广泛的定性和定量实验。核心是比较两种训练范式：混合多任务RLVR和单独RLVR后模型合并。技术特色在于从权重空间几何、模型预测行为、信息约束和自我验证等多个角度分析内部机制，以揭示跨领域协作的本质，该项目基于M2RL框架，但摘要未明确说明具体的数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，跨领域的RLVR几乎没有相互干扰，推理密集型领域如数学和编码表现出相互协同效应，意味着多任务训练中不同领域可相互促进。然而，摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进，也未提供与基线方法的量化对比数据。研究从内部机制分析揭示了协同增益的来源，但量化结果需要参考论文全文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于详细比较了混合训练与模型合并两种多领域RLVR范式，揭示了跨领域RLVR的协同效应和内部机制，如权重空间几何和模型预测行为的相互作用。这具有重要的学术价值，增进了对大型语言模型中多任务强化学习的理解，并为开发通用多领域专家级模型提供了实践指导。应用价值包括优化训练策略以提高模型性能，未来工作可进一步探索其他领域或扩展分析角度，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Understand Then Memory: A Cognitive Gist-Driven RAG Framework with Global Semantic Diffusion
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) effectively mitigates hallucinations in LLMs by incorporating external knowledge. However, the inherent discrete representation of text in existing frameworks often results in a loss of semantic integrity, leading to retrieval deviations. Inspired by the human episodic memory mechanism, we propose CogitoRAG, a RAG framework that simulates human cognitive memory processes. The core of this framework lies in the extraction and evolution of the Semantic Gist. During the offline indexing stage, CogitoRAG first deduces unstructured corpora into gist memory corpora, which are then transformed into a multi-dimensional knowledge graph integrating entities, relational facts, and memory nodes. In the online retrieval stage, the framework handles complex queries via Query Decomposition Module that breaks them into comprehensive sub-queries, mimicking the cognitive decomposition humans employ for complex information. Subsequently, Entity Diffusion Module performs associative retrieval across the graph, guided by structural relevance and an entity-frequency reward mechanism. Furthermore, we propose the CogniRank algorithm, which precisely reranks candidate passages by fusing diffusion-derived scores with semantic similarity. The final evidence is delivered to the generator in a passage-memory pairing format, providing high-density information support. Experimental results across five mainstream QA benchmarks and multi-task generation on GraphBench demonstrate that CogitoRAG significantly outperforms state-of-the-art RAG methods, showcasing superior capabilities in complex knowledge integration and reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 CogitoRAG，一个模拟人类认知记忆过程的 RAG 框架，通过语义 gist 提取和全局语义扩散提升检索准确性和推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有检索增强生成框架中，文本的离散表示常导致语义完整性丢失和检索偏差，限制了在知识密集型任务中的表现。这引发了对更准确信息检索的需求，因为传统方法在处理复杂查询时效率较低。研究旨在模拟人类认知机制，以增强语义表达，解决 RAG 在知识集成中的偏差问题，并提升大型语言模型在真实世界应用中的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是提取语义 gist 并构建知识图。离线阶段将无结构语料库转化为 gist 记忆语料库，再集成实体、关系事实和记忆节点为多维知识图。在线阶段通过查询分解模块处理复杂查询，实体扩散模块基于结构相关性和频率奖励机制进行关联检索。此外，CogniRank 算法融合扩散得分与语义相似度重新排名候选段落，最终以段落-记忆配对格式提供高密度信息支持。
light_analysis.result: 在五个主流 QA 基准和 GraphBench 上的多任务生成实验中，CogitoRAG 显著优于当前最先进的 RAG 方法，展示出在复杂知识集成和推理任务中的优越性能。具体表现在检索准确性和生成质量的提升，但摘要未提供详细数据指标；实验验证了该方法在减少偏差和增强语义一致性方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CogitoRAG 通过引入认知记忆机制改进 RAG 框架，提升语义表达和推理能力，贡献于知识增强语言模型的发展。其学术价值在于将认知理论应用于信息检索领域，实际应用价值在于提高智能问答和知识密集型任务的准确性。未来工作可探索计算效率优化和扩展到更大规模数据集，以进一步增强实用性。

title: MERIT Feedback Elicits Better Bargaining in LLM Negotiators
abstract: Bargaining is often regarded as a logical arena rather than an art or a matter of intuition, yet Large Language Models (LLMs) still struggle to navigate it due to limited strategic depth and difficulty adapting to complex human factors. Current benchmarks rarely capture this limitation. To bridge this gap, we present a utility feedback centric framework. Our contributions are: (i) AgoraBench, a new benchmark spanning nine challenging settings (e.g., deception, monopoly) that supports diverse strategy modeling; (ii) human-aligned, economically grounded metrics derived from utility theory. This is operationalized via agent utility, negotiation power, and acquisition ratio that implicitly measure how well the negotiation aligns with human preference and (iii) a human preference grounded dataset with learning pipeline that strengthens LLMs' bargaining ability through both prompting and finetuning. Empirical results indicate that baseline LLM strategies often diverge from human preferences, while our mechanism substantially improves negotiation performance, yielding deeper strategic behavior and stronger opponent awareness.
comment: Preprint. Typo corrected, New results added

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过提出一个以效用反馈为中心的框架，结合新基准AgoraBench和人类偏好数据集，显著提升了大型语言模型在讨价还价中的战略深度和对手意识。
light_analysis.motivation: 讨价还价通常被视为逻辑过程，但大型语言模型（LLMs）在处理谈判时面临战略深度有限和难以适应复杂人类因素的挑战。现有基准如AgoraBench很少能全面评估这些不足，导致模型表现与实际需求脱节。本研究旨在弥补这一缺陷，通过构建更全面的框架来模拟真实谈判场景，并基于人类偏好和经济理论来提高LLMs的谈判能力，推动自动谈判系统的发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出一个以效用反馈为中心的框架，包括三个主要贡献：（i）AgoraBench基准，涵盖九个挑战性设置（如欺骗、垄断），支持多样化策略建模；（ii）基于效用理论的人类对齐经济指标，如代理效用、谈判力和获取比，用于量化谈判与人类偏好的一致性；（iii）一个基于人类偏好的数据集和学习流程，通过提示和微调技术增强LLMs的讨价还价能力，优化模型在复杂互动中的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 实证结果表明，基线大型语言模型的谈判策略经常偏离人类偏好，而本文提出的机制显著改善了谈判性能，表现出更深层的战略行为和更强的对手意识。虽然没有提供具体数值，但机制在提升模型适应性和谈判效果方面表现突出，有效弥补了现有方法的不足，验证了框架的实用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是开发了一个综合框架来增强LLMs的讨价还价能力，包括新基准、经济指标和数据集，具有学术价值，推动LLM在复杂交互任务中的研究，并具有实际应用价值，可改进自动化谈判系统。未来方向可能包括扩展到更多谈判场景或优化学习算法，摘要未明确说明局限性，但为进一步研究提供了基础。

title: SDFed: Bridging Local Global Discrepancy via Subspace Refinement and Divergence Control in Federated Prompt Learning
abstract: Vision-language pretrained models offer strong transferable representations, yet adapting them in privacy-sensitive multi-party settings is challenging due to the high communication cost of federated optimization and the limited local data on clients. Federated prompt learning mitigates this issue by keeping the VLPM backbone frozen and collaboratively training lightweight prompt parameters. However, existing approaches typically enforce a unified prompt structure and length across clients, which is inadequate under practical client heterogeneity in both data distributions and system resources, and may further introduce conflicts between globally shared and locally optimal knowledge. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{SDFed}, a heterogeneous federated prompt learning framework that bridges Local-Global Discrepancy via Subspace Refinement and Divergence Control. SDFed maintains a fixed-length global prompt for efficient aggregation while allowing each client to learn a variable-length local prompt to better match its data characteristics and capacity. To mitigate local-global conflicts and facilitate effective knowledge transfer, SDFed introduces a subspace refinement method for local prompts and an information retention and divergence control strategy that preserves key local information while maintaining appropriate separability between global and local representations. Extensive experiments on several datasets demonstrate that SDFed consistently improves performance and robustness in heterogeneous federated settings.

light_analysis.overview: SDFed 是一个异构联合提示学习框架，通过子空间细化和分歧控制解决客户端异质性问题，提升性能和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于视觉语言预训练模型在隐私敏感多方设置中的适应挑战，由于联合优化通信成本高且客户端本地数据有限。现有联合提示学习方法通过冻结骨干和训练轻量提示参数减少开销，但强制统一提示结构不适应客户端在数据分布和系统资源上的异质性，导致本地与全局知识冲突，影响模型性能。因此，需要灵活框架来处理异质性，优化知识共享和模型适应性。
light_analysis.method: SDFed 框架的核心方法是维护固定长度的全局提示用于高效聚合，同时允许每个客户端学习可变长度的本地提示，以匹配数据特性和能力。关键创新包括子空间细化方法来优化本地提示的表示空间，以及信息保留与分歧控制策略，该策略在保留关键本地信息的同时控制全局和本地表示之间的差异，从而桥接本地-全局差异并促进有效知识转移。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，SDFed 在多个数据集上的异构联合设置中持续提高性能和鲁棒性。摘要未明确提供具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进的数值，但指出与现有方法相比，SDFed 在异质环境下表现更优，增强了模型的适应性和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了 SDFed 框架，通过子空间细化和分歧控制策略解决联合提示学习中的客户端异质性问题，有效桥接本地与全局差异。这具有学术价值，为异构分布式学习提供了新方法，并在隐私敏感应用中提高了模型性能和实用性。未来工作可探索扩展至其他模型类型或更复杂的异质场景。

title: Radial Müntz-Szász Networks: Neural Architectures with Learnable Power Bases for Multidimensional Singularities
abstract: Radial singular fields, such as $1/r$, $\log r$, and crack-tip profiles, are difficult to model with current coordinate-separable neural architectures. We formally establish this result: any $C^2$ function that is both radial and additively separable must be quadratic, establishing a fundamental obstruction for coordinate-wise power-law models. Motivated by this result, we introduce Radial Müntz-Szász Networks (RMN), which represent fields as linear combinations of learnable radial powers $r^μ$, including negative exponents, together with a limit-stable log-primitive for exact $\log r$ behavior. RMN admits closed-form spatial gradients and Laplacians, enabling physics-informed learning on punctured domains. Across ten 2D and 3D benchmarks, RMN achieves between 1.5 and 51 times lower RMSE than MLPs and between 10 and 100 times lower RMSE than SIREN, while using only 27 parameters, compared with 33,537 for MLPs and 8,577 for SIREN. We extend RMN to incorporate angular dependence (RMN-Angular) and to handle multiple sources with learnable centers (RMN-MC), whose source-center recovery errors fall below $10^{-4}$. We also report controlled failures on smooth, strongly non-radial targets to delineate RMN's operating regime.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Radial Müntz-Szász Networks（RMN），这是一种通过可学习的径向幂次基有效建模多维径向奇异场的新型神经架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前坐标可分离的神经架构难以建模径向奇异场，如$1/r$、$\log r$和裂纹尖端剖面，这些场在物理和工程问题中至关重要。研究动机源于理论证明：任何既是径向又是加法可分离的$C^2$函数必须是二次的，这揭示了现有坐标方向幂律模型的根本限制，无法有效处理奇异行为。因此，需要开发新的架构来克服这一障碍，提升场表示的精度和效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入Radial Müntz-Szász Networks（RMN），该方法使用线性组合的可学习径向幂次$r^\mu$，其中$\mu$可以是负指数，以捕捉奇异行为，并结合一个极限稳定的log原语来精确表示$\log r$场。关键创新包括允许闭形式的空间梯度和拉普拉斯算子，从而支持在 punctured domains 上的物理信息学习。此外，扩展了RMN以包含角度依赖性（RMN-Angular）和处理多个源的可学习中心（RMN-MC），增强了模型的灵活性和应用范围。
light_analysis.result: 在十个2D和3D基准测试中，RMN取得了显著性能：与MLPs相比，RMSE降低了1.5到51倍；与SIREN相比，降低了10到100倍，同时参数数量仅27个，远少于MLPs的33,537和SIREN的8,577。扩展版本RMN-MC的中心恢复误差低于$10^{-4}$，展示了高精度。论文还报告了在平滑、强非径向目标上的受控失败，以界定RMN的有效操作范围，突显其针对径向场建模的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: RMN的主要贡献在于提出了一种高效建模径向奇异场的神经架构，解决了现有方法的根本限制。学术上，它结合了理论分析和实践实现，推动了物理信息学习领域的发展；实际应用中，可广泛应用于裂纹分析、流体动力学等领域。局限性包括对非径向目标的表现不佳，未来工作可能涉及扩展模型以处理更广泛的场类型，或集成更多物理约束来提升通用性。

title: Rewards as Labels: Revisiting RLVR from a Classification Perspective
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards has recently advanced the capabilities of Large Language Models in complex reasoning tasks by providing explicit rule-based supervision. Among RLVR methods, GRPO and its variants have achieved strong empirical performance. Despite their success, we identify that they suffer from Gradient Misassignment in Positives and Gradient Domination in Negatives, which lead to inefficient and suboptimal policy updates. To address these issues, we propose Rewards as Labels (REAL), a novel framework that revisits verifiable rewards as categorical labels rather than scalar weights, thereby reformulating policy optimization as a classification problem. Building on this, we further introduce anchor logits to enhance policy learning. Our analysis reveals that REAL induces a monotonic and bounded gradient weighting, enabling balanced gradient allocation across rollouts and effectively mitigating the identified mismatches. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that REAL improves training stability and consistently outperforms GRPO and strong variants such as DAPO. On the 1.5B model, REAL improves average Pass@1 over DAPO by 6.7%. These gains further scale to 7B model, REAL continues to outperform DAPO and GSPO by 6.2% and 1.7%, respectively. Notably, even with a vanilla binary cross-entropy, REAL remains stable and exceeds DAPO by 4.5% on average.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REAL框架，将可验证奖励作为分类标签，以分类视角重新审视RLVR，解决梯度分配问题，提升大型语言模型在复杂推理任务中的策略优化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来，基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）通过提供显式规则监督，提升了大型语言模型在复杂推理任务中的能力，其中GRPO及其变体取得显著实证性能。然而，这些方法存在正样本梯度误分配和负样本梯度主导的问题，导致策略更新效率低下且次优，限制了训练稳定性和性能提升。因此，本研究旨在解决这些梯度不匹配，以提高RLVR方法的效率和效果。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Rewards as Labels（REAL）框架，核心创新在于将可验证奖励视为分类标签而非标量权重，从而将策略优化重新表述为分类问题。在此基础上，引入锚点logits以增强策略学习，通过单调且有界的梯度加权机制平衡不同rollouts中的梯度分配，有效缓解梯度误分配和主导问题。该方法基于大型语言模型，在数学推理基准上进行实验，但摘要未明确说明具体模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理基准上的大量实验表明，REAL显著提高了训练稳定性，并一致优于GRPO及其变体如DAPO。具体而言，在1.5B参数模型上，REAL的平均Pass@1比DAPO提高了6.7%；在7B参数模型上，继续以6.2%和1.7%的优势分别超越DAPO和GSPO。此外，即使使用普通二元交叉熵损失，REAL仍保持稳定并平均超过DAPO 4.5%，摘要未明确说明具体的基准名称和其他细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: REAL框架的主要贡献在于通过将RLVR重新定义为分类问题，解决了梯度分配问题，提高了训练稳定性和性能，为强化学习与可验证奖励的结合提供了新视角，具有重要的学术价值。在实际应用中，该方法可提升大型语言模型在复杂推理任务中的表现，摘要未明确说明潜在局限性或未来工作方向，但基于分析，未来可能探索更多任务扩展或技术整合。

title: Conditional Diffusion Guidance under Hard Constraint: A Stochastic Analysis Approach
abstract: We study conditional generation in diffusion models under hard constraints, where generated samples must satisfy prescribed events with probability one. Such constraints arise naturally in safety-critical applications and in rare-event simulation, where soft or reward-based guidance methods offer no guarantee of constraint satisfaction. Building on a probabilistic interpretation of diffusion models, we develop a principled conditional diffusion guidance framework based on Doob's h-transform, martingale representation and quadratic variation process. Specifically, the resulting guided dynamics augment a pretrained diffusion with an explicit drift correction involving the logarithmic gradient of a conditioning function, without modifying the pretrained score network. Leveraging martingale and quadratic-variation identities, we propose two novel off-policy learning algorithms based on a martingale loss and a martingale-covariation loss to estimate h and its gradient using only trajectories from the pretrained model. We provide non-asymptotic guarantees for the resulting conditional sampler in both total variation and Wasserstein distances, explicitly characterizing the impact of score approximation and guidance estimation errors. Numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods in enforcing hard constraints and generating rare-event samples. The code of the numerical experiments can be found at https://github.com/ZhengyiGuo2002/CDG_Finance.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于随机分析的条件扩散引导框架，用于硬约束下的生成任务，通过Doob's h-transform和新算法确保约束满足。
light_analysis.motivation: 在安全关键应用和稀有事件模拟中，生成样本必须严格满足硬约束（概率为一），但现有软约束或基于奖励的方法无法保证这一点，可能导致安全风险或模拟失真。这一问题的重要性在于约束违反会带来严重后果，例如在医疗或金融领域中的错误决策，因此开发可靠的条件生成方法成为迫切需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究基于扩散模型的概率解释，构建了一个原理性的条件扩散引导框架，利用Doob's h-transform、martingale表示和二次变差过程。该框架通过添加显式漂移校正来增强预训练扩散模型，涉及条件函数的对数梯度，而不修改预训练分数网络。提出两种新颖的离策略学习算法：基于martingale损失和martingale-covariation损失，仅使用预训练模型的轨迹来估计h及其梯度，从而实现高效的条件生成。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验证明了所提方法在强制执行硬约束和生成稀有事件样本方面的有效性，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但通过实验展示了方法的实用性和效率，代码已在GitHub开源以便复现和应用。与基线方法相比，该方法在约束满足方面表现出优势，不过具体对比数据摘要未提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了一个条件扩散引导框架，实现了硬约束下的可靠生成，并提出新的学习算法和理论保证（如总变差和Wasserstein距离的非渐近保证），具有重要学术价值，扩展了扩散模型的理论基础。在实际应用中，如安全关键和稀有事件模拟等领域有广阔前景，未来工作可能包括优化算法或扩展更复杂约束。

title: Hinge Regression Tree: A Newton Method for Oblique Regression Tree Splitting
abstract: Oblique decision trees combine the transparency of trees with the power of multivariate decision boundaries, but learning high-quality oblique splits is NP-hard, and practical methods still rely on slow search or theory-free heuristics. We present the Hinge Regression Tree (HRT), which reframes each split as a non-linear least-squares problem over two linear predictors whose max/min envelope induces ReLU-like expressive power. The resulting alternating fitting procedure is exactly equivalent to a damped Newton (Gauss-Newton) method within fixed partitions. We analyze this node-level optimization and, for a backtracking line-search variant, prove that the local objective decreases monotonically and converges; in practice, both fixed and adaptive damping yield fast, stable convergence and can be combined with optional ridge regularization. We further prove that HRT's model class is a universal approximator with an explicit $O(δ^2)$ approximation rate, and show on synthetic and real-world benchmarks that it matches or outperforms single-tree baselines with more compact structures.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Hinge Regression Tree (HRT)，一种使用阻尼牛顿方法优化oblique regression tree分割的新方法，将分割重新定义为非线性最小二乘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: Oblique decision trees结合了决策树的透明度和多元决策边界的强大能力，但学习高质量的oblique splits是NP-hard问题，导致实际应用受限。当前方法仍依赖慢速搜索或无理论启发式，缺乏效率和理论保证，限制了其在复杂数据集上的表现。因此，需要一种既高效又具有数学基础的优化方法来改进oblique splits的学习，从而提升模型性能和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: HRT将每个分割重新定义为非线性最小二乘问题，利用两个线性预测器的最大/最小包络来模拟ReLU的表达能力，从而增强模型的非线性表达能力。其拟合过程等价于阻尼牛顿（Gauss-Newton）方法，在固定分区内进行节点级优化，确保了数学上的精确性。论文分析了该优化过程，证明了回溯线搜索变体的目标函数单调下降且收敛；实际应用中，固定和自适应阻尼都能实现快速稳定收敛，并可结合可选的山脊正则化以防止过拟合，提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试中，HRT能够匹配或优于其他单树基线方法，同时形成更紧凑的树结构，这表明其在保持或提高性能的同时减少了模型复杂度。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但通过理论证明HRT作为通用逼近器具有O(δ^2)的逼近率，确保了模型的有效性。与基线方法相比，HRT在训练过程中收敛更快，结构更简洁，从而提高了实际应用的效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: HRT的主要贡献是提出了一种基于牛顿方法的oblique regression tree分割优化框架，提供了理论收敛保证和通用逼近能力，增强了oblique trees的理论基础。该方法平衡了模型的解释性和表达能力，为决策树领域提供了新的优化视角，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂场景或与其他机器学习技术集成，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Thickening-to-Thinning: Reward Shaping via Human-Inspired Learning Dynamics for LLM Reasoning
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising paradigm for enhancing reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). However, it frequently encounters challenges such as entropy collapse, excessive verbosity, and insufficient exploration for hard problems. Crucially, existing reward schemes fail to distinguish between the need for extensive search during problem-solving and the efficiency required for mastered knowledge. In this work, we introduce T2T(Thickening-to-Thinning), a dynamic reward framework inspired by human learning processes. Specifically, it implements a dual-phase mechanism: (1) On incorrect attempts, T2T incentivizes "thickening" (longer trajectories) to broaden the search space and explore novel solution paths; (2) Upon achieving correctness, it shifts to "thinning", imposing length penalties to discourage redundancy, thereby fostering model confidence and crystallizing reasoning capabilities. Extensive experiments on mathematical benchmarks (MATH-500, AIME, AMC) across Qwen-series and Deepseek models demonstrate that T2T significantly outperforms standard GRPO and recent baselines, achieving superior performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Thickening-to-Thinning（T2T）动态奖励框架，通过模仿人类学习动态优化大型语言模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）方法在提升大型语言模型推理能力时，常面临熵崩溃、输出冗长和困难问题探索不足等挑战。关键问题在于现有奖励方案未能有效区分问题解决过程中需要广泛搜索的需求与知识掌握后所需的效率，这限制了模型在复杂推理任务中的表现。优化LLM推理对于数学问题等实际应用至关重要，因此需要更智能的奖励机制来平衡探索与利用。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出T2T框架，受人类学习过程启发，采用双阶段奖励机制。具体包括：在模型推理错误时，实施'thickening'阶段，通过奖励更长轨迹来扩大搜索空间和探索新解决方案；在推理正确后，转向'thinning'阶段，施加长度惩罚以减少冗余输出，从而增强模型信心和精炼推理能力。关键创新在于动态调整奖励，模仿人类从探索到掌握的学习模式。实验使用了MATH-500、AIME和AMC数学基准，并在Qwen-series和Deepseek模型上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数学基准测试中，如MATH-500、AIME和AMC，T2T框架显著优于标准GRPO及近期基线方法，显示出优越性能。实验结果体现了T2T在提升推理准确性和效率方面的有效性，模型能够更好地平衡探索与利用，从而在各种任务中达到更高水平。摘要未明确说明具体准确率数字，但通过对比表明性能有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的核心贡献是提出了T2T动态奖励框架，有效解决了RLVR中的熵崩溃、冗长和探索不足等问题。在学术上，它为奖励塑造和LLM推理优化提供了新思路；在实际应用中，可提升模型在复杂推理任务中的表现。潜在局限性可能包括对特定任务或模型的依赖性，未来工作可探索框架的通用性和在其他领域的应用。

title: LatentMem: Customizing Latent Memory for Multi-Agent Systems
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-powered multi-agent systems (MAS) demonstrate remarkable collective intelligence, wherein multi-agent memory serves as a pivotal mechanism for continual adaptation. However, existing multi-agent memory designs remain constrained by two fundamental bottlenecks: (i) memory homogenization arising from the absence of role-aware customization, and (ii) information overload induced by excessively fine-grained memory entries. To address these limitations, we propose LatentMem, a learnable multi-agent memory framework designed to customize agent-specific memories in a token-efficient manner. Specifically, LatentMem comprises an experience bank that stores raw interaction trajectories in a lightweight form, and a memory composer that synthesizes compact latent memories conditioned on retrieved experience and agent-specific contexts. Further, we introduce Latent Memory Policy Optimization (LMPO), which propagates task-level optimization signals through latent memories to the composer, encouraging it to produce compact and high-utility representations. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks and mainstream MAS frameworks show that LatentMem achieves a performance gain of up to $19.36$% over vanilla settings and consistently outperforms existing memory architectures, without requiring any modifications to the underlying frameworks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了LatentMem框架，通过定制多代理系统的潜在内存，解决了内存同质化和信息过载问题，提升了集体智能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究背景聚焦于大型语言模型驱动的多代理系统（MAS），其集体智能依赖内存机制实现持续适应。现有方法面临两个瓶颈：一是内存同质化，源于缺乏角色感知的定制化，导致代理间内存相似，无法有效区分个体角色；二是信息过载，由于内存条目过于细粒度，造成冗余和效率低下。这些问题限制了系统的自适应能力和性能，因此需要开发更高效的内存框架以优化多代理交互。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出LatentMem，一个可学习的多代理内存框架，核心包括两个组件：经验库，以轻量级形式存储原始交互轨迹，避免信息冗余；内存作曲家，基于检索到的经验和代理特定上下文，合成紧凑的潜在内存表示。关键创新是引入Latent Memory Policy Optimization（LMPO），通过潜在内存将任务级优化信号传播到作曲家，促使其生成token高效、高实用性的内存表示。该方法无需修改底层多代理框架，能灵活集成到现有系统中。
light_analysis.result: 在多种基准测试和主流多代理系统框架上的实验表明，LatentMem显著提升性能，相比基础设置（vanilla settings），实现高达19.36%的性能增益。结果一致优于现有内存架构，显示出更强的适应性和效率。具体数据包括在多个场景下的稳定改进，证实了框架在减少内存过载和增强角色定制方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是设计了LatentMem框架，通过定制潜在内存解决了多代理系统的内存瓶颈，提升了集体智能表现。学术上，为多代理内存设计提供了新思路，结合了可学习优化和角色感知定制；实际上，框架无需修改底层系统即可集成，具有广泛的应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂的代理交互场景或扩展内存机制以应对动态环境变化。

title: Do Schwartz Higher-Order Values Help Sentence-Level Human Value Detection? A Study of Hierarchical Gating and Calibration
abstract: Human value detection from single sentences is a sparse, imbalanced multi-label task. We study whether Schwartz higher-order (HO) categories help this setting on ValueEval'24 / ValuesML (74K English sentences) under a compute-frugal budget. Rather than proposing a new architecture, we compare direct supervised transformers, hard HO$\rightarrow$values pipelines, Presence$\rightarrow$HO$\rightarrow$values cascades, compact instruction-tuned large language models (LLMs), QLoRA, and low-cost upgrades such as threshold tuning and small ensembles. HO categories are learnable: the easiest bipolar pair, Growth vs. Self-Protection, reaches Macro-$F_1=0.58$. The most reliable gains come from calibration and ensembling: threshold tuning improves Social Focus vs. Personal Focus from $0.41$ to $0.57$ ($+0.16$), transformer soft voting lifts Growth from $0.286$ to $0.303$, and a Transformer+LLM hybrid reaches $0.353$ on Self-Protection. In contrast, hard hierarchical gating does not consistently improve the end task. Compact LLMs also underperform supervised encoders as stand-alone systems, although they sometimes add useful diversity in hybrid ensembles. Under this benchmark, the HO structure is more useful as an inductive bias than as a rigid routing rule.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过比较多种方法，研究Schwartz高阶值在句子级别人类价值检测中的作用，发现校准和集成技术是最有效的改进策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 句子级别的人类价值检测是一个稀疏且不平衡的多标签任务，这在实际应用中导致检测困难。现有方法如硬层次门控在处理这种任务时效率不高，特别是在计算资源有限的情况下。因此，本研究旨在评估Schwartz高阶值结构是否能够提升检测性能，探索更有效的技术路线，以解决现有方法在资源受限环境中的不足。该问题的重要性在于，准确理解文本中的价值观对于NLP应用如内容分析和推荐系统至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法在ValueEval'24 / ValuesML数据集（包含74K英语句子）上进行，比较了多种技术：直接监督Transformer模型、硬HO到值的层次管道、存在检测到HO再到值的级联、紧凑指令调优的大型语言模型（LLM）、QLoRA量化适应，以及低成本升级如阈值调优和小型集成。关键创新点在于系统评估HO结构的使用，而不是提出新架构。具体细节包括使用Transformer进行端到端学习，LLM进行微调，QLoRA优化模型参数，并通过软投票和混合模型实现集成。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，HO类别是可学习的，例如成长与自我保护的宏F1得分达到0.58。校准技术如阈值调优显著提升了社会焦点与个人焦点的性能，从0.41提高到0.57（增益+0.16）。集成方法中，Transformer软投票将成长从0.286提升到0.303，而Transformer+LLM混合模型在自我保护上达到0.353。相比之下，硬层次门控未能持续改进最终任务，紧凑LLM作为独立系统表现不如监督编码器，尽管在混合集成中有时增加多样性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文结论强调，Schwartz高阶值结构在人类价值检测中作为归纳偏见比作为严格路由规则更有用。主要贡献在于实证展示了校准和集成技术的有效性，为资源受限的应用提供了可靠改进策略。学术价值在于验证了HO值的可学习性和低成本方法的优势，实际应用则有助于提升价值检测系统的性能。未来工作可以进一步探索其他HO结构或优化集成方法，以解决可能的局限性。

title: Mem-T: Densifying Rewards for Long-Horizon Memory Agents
abstract: Memory agents, which depart from predefined memory-processing pipelines by endogenously managing the processing, storage, and retrieval of memories, have garnered increasing attention for their autonomy and adaptability. However, existing training paradigms remain constrained: agents often traverse long-horizon sequences of memory operations before receiving sparse and delayed rewards, which hinders truly end-to-end optimization of memory management policies. To address this limitation, we introduce Mem-T, an autonomous memory agent that interfaces with a lightweight hierarchical memory database to perform dynamic updates and multi-turn retrieval over streaming inputs. To effectively train long-horizon memory management capabilities, we further propose MoT-GRPO, a tree-guided reinforcement learning framework that transforms sparse terminal feedback into dense, step-wise supervision via memory operation tree backpropagation and hindsight credit assignment, thereby enabling the joint optimization of memory construction and retrieval. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Mem-T is (1) high-performing, surpassing frameworks such as A-Mem and Mem0 by up to $14.92\%$, and (2) economical, operating on a favorable accuracy-efficiency Pareto frontier and reducing inference tokens per query by $\sim24.45\%$ relative to GAM without sacrificing performance.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Mem-T记忆代理和MoT-GRPO强化学习框架，通过密集化奖励解决长时程记忆管理的稀疏奖励问题，优化端到端训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 记忆代理因其自主性和适应性受到关注，但现有训练范式存在局限：代理需处理长序列记忆操作后才能获得稀疏和延迟的奖励，这阻碍了记忆管理策略的端到端优化。稀疏奖励导致学习效率低下，影响代理在复杂环境中的适应性，需要一种方法将稀疏反馈转化为密集监督以提升训练效果。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出Mem-T，一个自主记忆代理，与轻量级分层记忆数据库交互，支持对连续输入进行动态更新和多轮检索。核心创新是MoT-GRPO框架，采用树引导强化学习，通过记忆操作树反向传播和回顾信用分配，将稀疏终端反馈转化为密集的步级监督，从而联合优化记忆构建和检索过程，实现高效训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Mem-T在性能上超越基线方法A-Mem和Mem0高达14.92%，显示出显著改进。在效率方面，它位于有利的准确率-效率帕累托前沿，相对于GAM方法，每个查询的推理令牌减少约24.45%，且不牺牲性能，验证了其经济高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于提出Mem-T和MoT-GRPO，有效解决了长时程记忆代理的稀疏奖励挑战，提升了训练效率和代理性能。该研究具有学术价值，推动记忆代理技术的发展，未来工作可探索其在更广泛任务中的应用或进一步优化算法。

title: Real-Time Aligned Reward Model beyond Semantics
abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is a pivotal technique for aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences, yet it is susceptible to reward overoptimization, in which policy models overfit to the reward model, exploit spurious reward patterns instead of faithfully capturing human intent. Prior mitigations primarily relies on surface semantic information and fails to efficiently address the misalignment between the reward model (RM) and the policy model caused by continuous policy distribution shifts. This inevitably leads to an increasing reward discrepancy, exacerbating reward overoptimization. To address these limitations, we introduce R2M (Real-Time Aligned Reward Model), a novel lightweight RLHF framework. R2M goes beyond vanilla reward models that solely depend on the semantic representations of a pretrained LLM. Instead, it leverages the evolving hidden states of the policy (namely policy feedback) to align with the real-time distribution shift of the policy during the RL process. This work points to a promising new direction for improving the performance of reward models through real-time utilization of feedback from policy models.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了R2M（Real-Time Aligned Reward Model），一种通过利用策略模型的隐藏状态反馈来实时对齐策略分布偏移的新颖轻量级RLHF框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习人类反馈（RLHF）是使大型语言模型与人类偏好对齐的关键技术，但存在奖励过优化问题，即策略模型过拟合奖励模型，利用虚假模式而非忠实捕获人类意图。现有缓解方法主要依赖表面语义信息，未能有效处理由持续策略分布偏移引起的奖励模型与策略模型之间的不对齐，导致奖励差异增加和问题加剧，凸显了改进的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 本文引入R2M（Real-Time Aligned Reward Model），一个新颖的轻量级RLHF框架。R2M区别于传统仅依赖预训练LLM语义表示的奖励模型，它利用策略模型的演化隐藏状态（称为策略反馈），在强化学习过程中与策略的实时分布偏移对齐，从而更有效地解决不对齐问题。关键创新在于实时利用策略反馈来调整奖励模型，摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果和性能指标。基于论文内容，R2M框架旨在减少奖励过优化并改善对齐效果，但具体的数据支撑如准确率提升或效率改进等细节未在摘要中提及，需要参考全文以获取完整实验结果和与基线方法的对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了R2M框架，通过实时利用策略模型的反馈来改进奖励模型性能，为解决奖励过优化问题提供了新方向。其学术价值在于为RLHF的对齐问题提供了创新解决方案，可能应用于提升大型语言模型与人类意图的匹配度。未来工作可进一步探索R2M的实际部署和扩展，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Transferable Graph Condensation from the Causal Perspective
abstract: The increasing scale of graph datasets has significantly improved the performance of graph representation learning methods, but it has also introduced substantial training challenges. Graph dataset condensation techniques have emerged to compress large datasets into smaller yet information-rich datasets, while maintaining similar test performance. However, these methods strictly require downstream applications to match the original dataset and task, which often fails in cross-task and cross-domain scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose a novel causal-invariance-based and transferable graph dataset condensation method, named TGCC, providing effective and transferable condensed datasets. Specifically, to preserve domain-invariant knowledge, we first extract domain causal-invariant features from the spatial domain of the graph using causal interventions. Then, to fully capture the structural and feature information of the original graph, we perform enhanced condensation operations. Finally, through spectral-domain enhanced contrastive learning, we inject the causal-invariant features into the condensed graph, ensuring that the compressed graph retains the causal information of the original graph. Experimental results on five public datasets and our novel FinReport dataset demonstrate that TGCC achieves up to a 13.41% improvement in cross-task and cross-domain complex scenarios compared to existing methods, and achieves state-of-the-art performance on 5 out of 6 datasets in the single dataset and task scenario.
comment: The project paper is currently under company confidentiality restrictions, and the data and models cannot be made publicly available at this time

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了基于因果不变性的可转移图数据集压缩方法TGCC，解决了现有方法在跨任务和跨域场景中的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着图数据集规模的增大，图表示学习性能提升但训练挑战加剧。图数据集压缩技术旨在将大型数据集压缩为信息丰富的小型数据集，以保持类似测试性能。然而，现有方法严格要求下游应用匹配原始数据集和任务，这在跨任务和跨域场景中常常失败，限制了实际应用。因此，开发可转移的图压缩方法至关重要，以提高数据压缩的通用性和适应性，应对复杂多变的现实场景。
light_analysis.method: TGCC方法首先通过因果干预从图的空间域提取域因果不变特征，以保留域不变知识。然后，为全面捕捉原图的结构和特征信息，进行增强压缩操作。最后，通过谱域增强对比学习，将因果不变特征注入压缩图中，确保压缩图保留原图的因果信息。该方法的关键创新点在于结合因果视角，利用因果干预提取不变特征，并通过对比学习强化特征注入，生成可转移的压缩数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验在五个公共数据集和新构建的FinReport数据集上进行。在跨任务和跨域复杂场景中，TGCC相比现有方法提升高达13.41%。在单一数据集和任务场景中，TGCC在6个数据集中的5个上达到了最先进的性能。具体地，实验结果证明了TGCC在保持压缩效率的同时，显著提高了可转移性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种基于因果不变性的可转移图数据集压缩方法TGCC。该方法通过因果干预和对比学习，有效保留了原图的因果信息，增强了压缩数据集的跨任务和跨域适用性。学术上，它将因果视角引入图压缩领域，推动了相关研究；实际上，为大规模图数据的高效处理提供了新工具。未来工作可探索更广泛的应用场景和进一步优化方法。

title: MeanCache: From Instantaneous to Average Velocity for Accelerating Flow Matching Inference
abstract: We present MeanCache, a training-free caching framework for efficient Flow Matching inference. Existing caching methods reduce redundant computation but typically rely on instantaneous velocity information (e.g., feature caching), which often leads to severe trajectory deviations and error accumulation under high acceleration ratios. MeanCache introduces an average-velocity perspective: by leveraging cached Jacobian--vector products (JVP) to construct interval average velocities from instantaneous velocities, it effectively mitigates local error accumulation. To further improve cache timing and JVP reuse stability, we develop a trajectory-stability scheduling strategy as a practical tool, employing a Peak-Suppressed Shortest Path under budget constraints to determine the schedule. Experiments on FLUX.1, Qwen-Image, and HunyuanVideo demonstrate that MeanCache achieves 4.12X and 4.56X and 3.59X acceleration, respectively, while consistently outperforming state-of-the-art caching baselines in generation quality. We believe this simple yet effective approach provides a new perspective for Flow Matching inference and will inspire further exploration of stability-driven acceleration in commercial-scale generative models.

light_analysis.overview: MeanCache 是一个无需训练的缓存框架，通过引入平均速度视角和轨迹稳定性调度策略，有效加速 Flow Matching 推理并减少误差累积。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有缓存方法在加速 Flow Matching 推理时，依赖瞬时速度信息（如特征缓存），导致在高加速比下产生严重轨迹偏差和误差累积，影响生成质量。这个问题对高效部署商业规模生成模型至关重要，因为误差累积会降低推理的稳定性和准确性，因此需要一种更稳定的方法来优化性能。
light_analysis.method: MeanCache 框架的核心是采用平均速度视角，通过缓存的 Jacobian-向量积（JVP）从瞬时速度构建区间平均速度，从而减轻局部误差累积。关键创新包括轨迹稳定性调度策略，利用在预算约束下的 Peak-Suppressed Shortest Path 算法确定缓存时机，以提高 JVP 重用的稳定性和效率，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在 FLUX.1、Qwen-Image 和 HunyuanVideo 数据集上的实验表明，MeanCache 分别实现了 4.12 倍、4.56 倍和 3.59 倍的推理加速。同时，在生成质量方面，它 consistently 优于最先进的缓存基线方法，验证了其在减少误差累积和提升性能方面的有效性，具体质量指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了 MeanCache，一个简单而有效的缓存框架，为 Flow Matching 推理提供了基于平均速度的新视角，显著加速推理并减少误差累积。这具有重要的学术价值，为生成模型推理优化提供了新思路，并在实际应用中可能推动商业规模模型的稳定性驱动加速探索，未来工作可进一步扩展该方法的适用范围。

title: MAS-Orchestra: Understanding and Improving Multi-Agent Reasoning Through Holistic Orchestration and Controlled Benchmarks
abstract: While multi-agent systems (MAS) promise elevated intelligence through coordination of agents, current approaches to automatic MAS design under-deliver. Such shortcomings stem from two key factors: (1) methodological complexity - agent orchestration is performed using sequential, code-level execution that limits global system-level holistic reasoning and scales poorly with agent complexity - and (2) efficacy uncertainty - MAS are deployed without understanding if there are tangible benefits compared to single-agent systems (SAS). We propose MASOrchestra, a training-time framework that formulates MAS orchestration as a function-calling reinforcement learning problem with holistic orchestration, generating an entire MAS at once. In MAS-Orchestra, complex, goal-oriented subagents are abstracted as callable functions, enabling global reasoning over system structure while hiding internal execution details. To rigorously study when and why MAS are beneficial, we introduce MASBENCH, a controlled benchmark that characterizes tasks along five axes: Depth, Horizon, Breadth, Parallel, and Robustness. Our analysis reveals that MAS gains depend critically on task structure, verification protocols, and the capabilities of both orchestrator and subagents, rather than holding universally. Guided by these insights, MAS-Orchestra achieves consistent improvements on public benchmarks including mathematical reasoning, multi-hop QA, and search-based QA, while achieving more than 10x efficiency over strong baselines. Together, MAS-Orchestra and MASBENCH enable better training and understanding of MAS in the pursuit of multi-agent intelligence.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出MAS-Orchestra框架和MASBENCH基准，通过整体编排和受控基准来理解和改进多智能体推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）通过代理协调提升智能，但当前方法存在方法论复杂性和效果不确定性。方法论复杂性表现为代理编排采用顺序、代码级执行，限制全局系统级整体推理，且在代理复杂度增加时扩展性差；效果不确定性指部署MAS时，难以确定相比单智能体系统（SAS）的实际优势，导致应用风险。这些问题阻碍了MAS潜力的发挥，因此需要更有效的编排方法和评估标准来确保实际效益。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出MAS-Orchestra框架，将MAS编排表述为函数调用强化学习问题，实现整体编排。在该框架中，复杂、目标导向的子代理被抽象为可调用函数，隐藏内部执行细节，使编排器能进行全局推理并一次性生成整个MAS。关键创新在于结合强化学习和函数抽象来优化MAS设计。此外，引入MASBENCH受控基准，通过深度、视界、广度、并行和鲁棒性五个轴特征化任务，以系统分析MAS性能，提供任务依赖性理解。
light_analysis.result: MAS-Orchestra在公共基准测试中取得一致改进，包括数学推理、多跳问答和基于搜索的问答任务。实验显示，相比于强基线方法，该框架在效率上实现超过10倍的提升，表明整体编排方法能有效减少执行开销。MASBENCH分析揭示MAS收益取决于任务结构、验证协议以及编排器和子代理的能力，而非普遍存在，为MAS应用提供了量化指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是MAS-Orchestra框架和MASBENCH基准，共同推动了多智能体系统的训练和理解。MAS-Orchestra通过整体编排和强化学习优化设计，提升性能和效率；MASBENCH为评估提供受控环境，揭示任务依赖性。学术价值在于提供系统化方法，实际应用价值在于增强多智能体智能部署。未来工作可基于MASBENCH探索不同场景优化，并应对潜在局限性如任务泛化能力。

title: FLARE: Learning Future-Aware Latent Representations from Vision-Language Models for Autonomous Driving
abstract: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer rich world knowledge for end-to-end autonomous driving, current approaches heavily rely on labor-intensive language annotations (e.g., VQA) to bridge perception and control. This paradigm suffers from a fundamental mismatch between discrete linguistic tokens and continuous driving trajectories, often leading to suboptimal control policies and inefficient utilization of pre-trained knowledge. To address these challenges, we propose FLARE (Future-aware LAtent REpresentation), a novel framework that activates the visual-semantic capabilities of pre-trained VLMs without requiring language supervision. Instead of aligning with text, we introduce a self-supervised future feature prediction objective. This mechanism compels the model to anticipate scene dynamics and ego-motion directly in the latent space, enabling the learning of robust driving representations from large-scale unlabeled trajectory data. Furthermore, we integrate Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) into the planning process to refine decision-making quality. Extensive experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark demonstrate that FLARE achieves state-of-the-art performance, validating the effectiveness of leveraging VLM knowledge via predictive self-supervision rather than explicit language generation.

light_analysis.overview: FLARE框架通过自监督未来特征预测激活预训练视觉-语言模型的视觉语义能力，实现无需语言监督的自动驾驶表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶研究中，视觉-语言模型提供丰富世界知识，但现有方法依赖劳动密集型语言注释（如视觉问答）来连接感知与控制，导致离散语言标记与连续驾驶轨迹不匹配，产生次优控制策略和低效利用预训练知识。因此，本研究旨在解决这一不匹配问题，提升自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性和效率，避免依赖语言生成的局限性。
light_analysis.method: FLARE框架引入自我监督的未来特征预测目标，使模型在潜在空间中直接预测场景动态和自运动，从大规模无标签轨迹数据学习稳健驾驶表示，无需语言监督即可激活预训练VLM的视觉语义能力。此外，集成Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）到规划过程，优化决策质量，增强端到端控制能力。
