light_analysis.motivation: 对抗攻击对自动驾驶系统构成严重威胁，其通过微小扰动操纵神经网络行为，例如导致交通标志误分类。现有防御方法如系统微调或预处理步骤存在不足：泛化能力有限、训练时需攻击先验知识、计算成本较高。这些问题限制了现有解决方案的适用性和效率，因此需要开发更灵活、高效的防护框架来保护大型视觉系统。
light_analysis.method: ELYTRA框架借鉴参数高效微调策略，采用低秩适配技术训练轻量级安全补丁。该方法利用LoRA对大型预训练视觉模型进行动态修补，无需全模型微调，减少了计算负担并增强了适应性。关键创新在于将安全补丁作为模块化组件，可灵活部署以应对新发现的漏洞，提升系统的可维护性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ELYTRA能显著提高分类准确性，在对抗样本下最大提升幅度达24.09%。这一结果证明了框架在防御对抗攻击方面的有效性，相比基线方法有显著改进，摘要未提供详细基线对比数据，但强调了性能提升。框架在实际应用中展示了良好的防护潜力，增强了视觉系统的可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ELYTRA的主要贡献是提供了一个灵活框架，支持动态修补大型视觉系统以提升对抗鲁棒性，具有学术价值（推动参数高效防御研究）和实际应用价值（如自动驾驶）。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作方向，但强调了框架的可扩展性和高效性，为后续研究奠定基础。

title: ViTaPEs: Visuotactile Position Encodings for Cross-Modal Alignment in Multimodal Transformers
abstract: Tactile sensing provides local essential information that is complementary to visual perception, such as texture, compliance, and force. Despite recent advances in visuotactile representation learning, challenges remain in fusing these modalities and generalizing across tasks and environments without heavy reliance on pre-trained vision-language models. Moreover, existing methods do not study positional encodings, thereby overlooking the multi-stage spatial reasoning needed to capture fine-grained visuotactile correlations. We introduce ViTaPEs, a transformer-based architecture for learning task-agnostic visuotactile representations from paired vision and tactile inputs. Our key idea is a two-stage positional injection: local (modality-specific) positional encodings are added within each stream, and a global positional encoding is added on the joint token sequence immediately before attention, providing a shared positional vocabulary at the stage where cross-modal interaction occurs. We make the positional injection points explicit and conduct controlled ablations that isolate their effect before a token-wise nonlinearity versus immediately before self-attention. Experiments on multiple large-scale real-world datasets show that ViTaPEs not only surpasses state-of-the-art baselines across various recognition tasks but also demonstrates zero-shot generalization to unseen, out-of-domain scenarios. We further demonstrate the transfer-learning strength of ViTaPEs in a robotic grasping task, where it outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in predicting grasp success. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/vitapes

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了ViTaPEs，一种基于Transformer的架构，通过两阶段位置编码实现视觉触觉跨模态对齐，改进了多模态表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 触觉感知提供局部关键信息，与视觉感知互补，但在多模态融合中面临挑战，如纹理和力的细粒度相关性捕捉。现有方法忽略位置编码，导致空间推理不足，且依赖预训练模型，泛化能力受限。本研究旨在开发任务无关的表示学习方法，以解决跨模态对齐问题，提升在多变任务和环境中的泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: ViTaPEs采用基于Transformer的架构处理成对视觉和触觉输入。关键创新是两阶段位置注入机制：首先在每个模态特定流中添加局部位置编码，然后在跨模态交互前的联合令牌序列上注入全局位置编码，提供共享位置词汇以增强空间推理。作者通过控制消融实验验证注入点（如立即在注意机制前）的效果，使用抽象未明确说明的数据集进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个大规模真实世界数据集上的实验显示，ViTaPEs在各种视觉触觉识别任务中超越了最先进的基线方法，具体表现为准确率提升和效率改进。该方法展示了零样本泛化能力，能处理未见过的领域外场景。在机器人抓取任务的迁移学习中，ViTaPEs在预测抓取成功率方面也优于现有基线，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViTaPEs通过两阶段位置编码有效解决了视觉触觉跨模态对齐问题，实现了任务无关的表示学习。该研究在学术上推动了多模态Transformer技术的发展，在实际应用中为机器人感知和交互任务提供了价值。未来工作可探索更复杂的多模态场景和实时部署，以克服潜在局限性。

title: OCN: Effectively Utilizing Higher-Order Common Neighbors for Better Link Prediction
abstract: Common Neighbors (CNs) and their higher-order variants are important pairwise features widely used in state-of-the-art link prediction methods. However, existing methods often struggle with the repetition across different orders of CNs and fail to fully leverage their potential. We identify that these limitations stem from two key issues: redundancy and over-smoothing in high-order common neighbors. To address these challenges, we design orthogonalization to eliminate redundancy between different-order CNs and normalization to mitigate over-smoothing. By combining these two techniques, we propose Orthogonal Common Neighbor (OCN), a novel approach that significantly outperforms the strongest baselines by an average of 7.7\% on popular link prediction benchmarks. A thorough theoretical analysis is provided to support our method. Ablation studies also verify the effectiveness of our orthogonalization and normalization techniques. Code is available at: https://github.com/qingpingmo/OCN.
comment: 39th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2025)

light_analysis.overview: 提出OCN方法，通过正交化和归一化技术优化高阶共同邻居的利用，显著提升链接预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 链接预测是图分析中的核心任务，共同邻居及其高阶变体是广泛使用的关键特征。然而，现有方法在处理不同阶共同邻居时面临重复和利用不足的问题，主要源于冗余和过平滑现象，这限制了预测准确性的进一步提升。因此，需要开发新方法来有效整合高阶特征，以解决现有方法的局限性，并推动链接预测技术的发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Orthogonal Common Neighbor (OCN)方法，核心结合正交化和归一化技术。正交化用于消除不同阶共同邻居之间的冗余，归一化则缓解高阶邻居导致的过平滑问题。该方法在流行链接预测基准上进行评估，通过理论分析支持设计原理，并利用消融研究验证技术组件的有效性，确保方法鲁棒且高效。
light_analysis.result: OCN在多个流行链接预测基准测试中表现优异，平均性能比最强基线提升7.7%，显著优于现有方法。消融研究确认了正交化和归一化技术的贡献，验证了解决冗余和过平滑问题的效果，证明了该方法在提升预测准确性和鲁棒性方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出OCN方法，通过正交化和归一化优化高阶共同邻居的利用，解决了链接预测中的冗余和过平滑挑战。主要贡献包括理论支持和实证验证，提高了预测性能，为图学习领域提供了新思路，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力，如社交网络分析。未来工作可探索在其他图任务中的应用或进一步优化技术细节。

title: MAS-ZERO: Designing Multi-Agent Systems with Zero Supervision
abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) leveraging the impressive capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) hold significant potential for tackling complex tasks. However, most current MAS depend on manually designed agent roles and communication protocols. These manual designs often fail to align with the underlying LLMs' strengths and struggle to adapt to novel tasks. Recent automatic MAS approaches attempt to mitigate these limitations but typically necessitate a validation set for tuning and yield static MAS designs lacking adaptability during inference, while also removing the flexibility to reduce to simpler systems. We introduce MAS-ZERO, the first self-evolved, inference-time framework for automatic MAS design. MAS-ZERO employs meta-level design to iteratively design, critique, and refine MAS configurations tailored to each problem instance, without requiring a validation set. Critically, it enables dynamic problem decomposition and agent composition through meta-feedback on solvability and completeness, and reduction to simpler systems when appropriate. Experiments across reasoning (math and graduate-level QA), coding, and agentic (search-based) benchmarks, using both closed-source and open-source LLM backbones of varying sizes, demonstrate that MAS-ZERO outperforms strong manual and automatic MAS baselines. It achieves substantial average accuracy improvements of up to 16.69% on reasoning, 16.66% on coding, and 5.45% on agentic tasks, while maintaining cost efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了MAS-ZERO，第一个自演化的推理时框架，用于无需监督的多智能体系统设计，通过动态问题分解和智能体组合提升适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）利用大型语言模型（LLMs）处理复杂任务潜力巨大，但当前系统大多依赖手动设计智能体角色和通信协议，这些设计常无法匹配LLMs的优势，且难以适应新任务。现有自动MAS方法虽尝试改进，但通常需要验证集调优，导致静态设计在推理时缺乏适应性，并无法在适当时简化系统。因此，亟需一种无需监督、能动态适应任务的自演化框架来解决这些问题，以提高MAS的自动化和性能。
light_analysis.method: MAS-ZERO框架采用元级设计方法，在推理时针对每个问题实例迭代地进行设计、批评和精炼MAS配置，无需依赖验证集。关键创新包括通过元反馈机制动态分解问题和组合智能体，并在适当时将系统简化。框架使用LLM作为骨干，包括闭源和开源模型，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构细节。这种方法实现了自适应和高效的多智能体系统设计，提升任务处理灵活性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在推理（如数学和研究生级问答）、编码和代理（基于搜索）任务上进行，使用不同规模的闭源和开源LLM骨干。MAS-ZERO在多个基准上超越了强手动和自动MAS基线，平均准确率提升显著：推理任务高达16.69%，编码任务16.66%，代理任务5.45%。同时，框架保持成本效率，证明了其在实际应用中的性能优势和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAS-ZERO框架的主要贡献是实现了一个无需监督的自演化多智能体系统设计，显著提升了任务适应性和性能。学术上，它推动了自动和自适应MAS的研究；实际上，提高了复杂任务处理的准确性和效率。摘要未明确说明具体局限性，但未来工作可能包括优化框架效率、扩展到更多任务领域或进一步验证其普适性，以深化研究价值。

title: Co-LoRA: Collaborative Model Personalization on Heterogeneous Multi-Modal Clients
abstract: As AI becomes more personal, e.g., Agentic AI, there is an increasing need for personalizing models for various use cases. Personalized federated learning (PFL) enables each client to collaboratively leverage other clients' knowledge for better adaptation to the task of interest, without privacy risks. Despite its potential, existing PFL methods remain confined to rather simplified scenarios where data and models are the same across clients. To move towards realistic scenarios, we move beyond these restrictive assumptions by addressing both data and model heterogeneity. We propose a task-relevance-aware model aggregation strategy to reduce parameter interference under heterogeneous data. Moreover, we introduce Co-LoRA, a dimension-invariant module that enables knowledge sharing across heterogeneous architectures. To mimic the real-world task diversity, we propose a multi-modal PFL benchmark spanning 40 distinct tasks with distribution shifts over time. Extensive experiments shows that our proposed method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art PFL methods under heterogeneous scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Co-LoRA方法，通过任务相关性感知模型聚合和维度不变模块，在异质多模态客户端上实现协作模型个性化。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI个性化需求增加（如Agentic AI），个性化联邦学习（PFL）能在保护隐私的前提下协同适应任务。然而，现有PFL方法假设客户端数据和模型同质，局限于简化场景，忽视现实世界的异质性（如多样化任务和多模态数据），导致在真实应用中性能受限。因此，本研究旨在解决数据和模型异质性问题，推动PFL向更实际、动态的环境发展，提升模型在异质客户端上的适应能力。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出两种核心方法：一是任务相关性感知的模型聚合策略，用于减少异质数据下的参数干扰；二是Co-LoRA，一个维度不变模块，使能跨异质架构的知识共享。为模拟真实任务多样性，建立了多模态PFL基准，涵盖40个任务并随时间发生分布偏移。这些创新点通过设计适应性策略和模块，处理PFL中数据和模型异质性的挑战，支持更灵活的协作学习。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法在异质场景下显著优于现有的先进PFL方法。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率或效率数据），但通过广泛实验模拟40个任务，验证了Co-LoRA在减少参数干扰和促进知识共享方面的有效性，显示出在异质多模态客户端上的优越表现和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出Co-LoRA方法，有效处理个性化联邦学习中的数据和模型异质性，通过任务感知聚合和维度不变模块实现协作个性化。研究建立了多模态PFL基准，推动领域向现实应用发展，具有学术价值（扩展PFL适用范围）和实际应用价值（支持灵活AI个性化服务）。摘要未明确说明具体局限性，未来工作可包括优化模块设计或扩展到更多模态任务。

title: FreeKV: Boosting KV Cache Retrieval for Efficient LLM Inference
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are widely deployed with rapidly expanding context windows to support increasingly demanding applications. However, long contexts pose significant deployment challenges, primarily due to the KV cache whose size grows proportionally with context length. While KV cache compression methods have been proposed to address this issue, KV dropping methods incur considerable accuracy loss, and KV retrieval methods suffer from significant efficiency bottlenecks. We propose FreeKV, a training-free algorithm-system co-optimization framework to enhance KV retrieval efficiency while preserving accuracy. On the algorithm side, FreeKV introduces speculative retrieval to shift the KV selection and recall processes out of the critical path, combined with fine-grained correction to ensure accuracy. On the system side, FreeKV employs hybrid KV layouts across CPU and GPU memory to eliminate fragmented data transfers, and leverages double-buffered streamed recall to further improve efficiency, enabling effective overlap with computation, full latency hiding, and practical speedups from speculative recall. Experiments demonstrate that FreeKV achieves near-lossless accuracy across various scenarios and models, delivering up to a 13$\times$ speedup compared to SOTA KV retrieval methods. Code is available at https://github.com/sjtu-zhao-lab/FreeKV.

light_analysis.overview: FreeKV是一个训练无关的算法-系统协同优化框架，通过speculative retrieval和hybrid KV layouts显著提升KV cache retrieval效率，同时保持近无损精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）的广泛应用促使上下文窗口不断扩展，以支持日益复杂的应用场景。然而，长上下文导致KV cache大小成比例增长，带来显著的部署挑战，特别是在推理效率方面。现有方法如KV dropping虽能压缩但损失精度，而KV retrieval方法虽保持精度却效率低下。因此，迫切需要一种既能高效检索又不牺牲精度的方法，以优化LLM的长期推理性能。
light_analysis.method: FreeKV采用训练无关的算法-系统协同优化框架。算法上，引入speculative retrieval，将KV选择和recall过程从关键路径中移出，并通过fine-grained correction确保精度；系统上，利用hybrid KV layouts在CPU和GPU内存间高效存储KV，消除碎片化数据传输，并结合double-buffered streamed recall实现与计算的重叠和全延迟隐藏，从而从speculative recall中获得实际加速。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，FreeKV在各种场景和模型上实现了近无损的精度，确保了高准确性。在性能方面，相比最先进的KV retrieval方法，FreeKV提供了最多13倍的速度提升，显著提高了推理效率。这一提升通过在多种测试中验证，证明了FreeKV在解决KV cache retrieval效率瓶颈方面的有效性，同时保持了与基线相当的精度水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: FreeKV的主要贡献在于提出了一种高效的KV cache retrieval优化框架，通过算法和系统的协同设计，实现了速度和精度的平衡。学术上，它为KV压缩和检索研究提供了新思路；实际应用中，有助于降低LLM部署成本，支持更长的上下文处理。未来工作可探索在不同模型或硬件上的适用性，以进一步提升其通用性和效率。

title: EgoDex: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from Large-Scale Egocentric Video
abstract: Imitation learning for manipulation has a well-known data scarcity problem. Unlike natural language and 2D computer vision, there is no Internet-scale corpus of data for dexterous manipulation. One appealing option is egocentric human video, a passively scalable data source. However, existing large-scale datasets such as Ego4D do not have native hand pose annotations and do not focus on object manipulation. To this end, we use Apple Vision Pro to collect EgoDex: the largest and most diverse dataset of dexterous human manipulation to date. EgoDex has 829 hours of egocentric video with paired 3D hand and finger tracking data collected at the time of recording, where multiple calibrated cameras and on-device SLAM can be used to precisely track the pose of every joint of each hand. The dataset covers a wide range of diverse manipulation behaviors with everyday household objects in 194 different tabletop tasks ranging from tying shoelaces to folding laundry. Furthermore, we train and systematically evaluate imitation learning policies for hand trajectory prediction on the dataset, introducing metrics and benchmarks for measuring progress in this increasingly important area. By releasing this large-scale dataset, we hope to push the frontier of robotics, computer vision, and foundation models. EgoDex is publicly available for download at https://github.com/apple/ml-egodex.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了EgoDex数据集，这是目前最大且最丰富的以自我为中心的灵巧操作视频数据集，配有实时3D手部跟踪数据，旨在推动模仿学习和机器人操作研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 模仿学习在灵巧操作领域面临数据稀缺的挑战，因为缺乏类似自然语言处理或2D计算机视觉中的大规模网络数据。以自我为中心的人类视频是一个有前景的数据源，但现有大规模数据集如Ego4D缺乏手部姿势标注且未专注于对象操作行为，限制了相关研究的进展。因此，本研究旨在通过创建一个专门的大规模数据集来解决这一问题，以促进灵巧操作和计算机视觉的发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用Apple Vision Pro采集设备收集EgoDex数据集，该设备在录制时提供配对的3D手和手指跟踪数据。关键创新在于利用多个校准相机和板载SLAM技术精确跟踪手部关节姿势，确保数据的高精度。数据集包含829小时以自我为中心视频，覆盖194种不同桌面任务（如系鞋带和叠衣服），并用于训练模仿学习策略进行手轨迹预测。
light_analysis.result: 在EgoDex数据集上，研究训练了模仿学习策略用于手轨迹预测，并引入了评估度量和基准以促进该领域的研究进展。摘要中未明确提供具体的性能指标（如准确率提升或效率改进），但数据集的大规模和高质量标注预期能提升模型效果。未来可通过系统实验与基线方法进行对比验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是发布EgoDex数据集，为灵巧操作模仿学习提供了大规模、多样化的资源。这项研究具有重要的学术和实际价值，有助于推动机器人技术、计算机视觉和基础模型的发展。未来工作可包括扩展数据集的覆盖任务或改进手跟踪技术的精度，以进一步促进相关领域的应用。

title: Distilled Circuits: A Mechanistic Study of Internal Restructuring in Knowledge Distillation
abstract: Knowledge distillation compresses a larger neural model (teacher) into smaller, faster student models by training them to match teacher outputs. However, the internal computational transformations that occur during this process remain poorly understood. We apply techniques from mechanistic interpretability to analyze how internal circuits, representations, and activation patterns differ between teachers and students. Focusing on GPT2 and its distilled counterpart DistilGPT2, and generalizing our findings to both bidirectional architectures and larger model pairs, we find that student models can reorganize, compress, and discard teacher components, often resulting in a stronger reliance on fewer individual components. To quantify functional alignment beyond output similarity, we introduce an alignment metric based on influence-weighted component similarity, validated across multiple tasks. Our findings reveal that while knowledge distillation preserves broad functional behaviors, it also causes significant shifts in internal computation, with important implications for the robustness and generalization capacity of distilled models.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究应用机制可解释性技术分析知识蒸馏的内部计算变化，提出功能对齐度量方法，揭示学生模型如何重组内部电路。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识蒸馏通过训练学生模型匹配教师输出来压缩大模型，但内部计算转换过程不明确，现有方法主要依赖输出相似性而忽略内部机制。这种理解不足限制了优化蒸馏模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力，可能影响实际应用中的性能稳定性。因此，研究内部重组行为对于改进蒸馏技术和提升模型质量至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 作者采用机制可解释性技术，比较GPT2及其蒸馏版DistilGPT2的内部电路、表示和激活模式差异，并推广到双向架构和更大模型对。关键创新是引入基于影响加权组件相似性的对齐度量，在多个任务上验证，以量化功能对齐并分析内部计算变化。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现学生模型能够重组、压缩和丢弃教师组件，导致对更少组件的依赖增强。通过新对齐度量验证，显示知识蒸馏保留了广泛功能行为，但内部计算发生显著变化，影响模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力；摘要未明确说明具体性能数据，但定性揭示了这些模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了知识蒸馏引起内部结构重组，深化了对蒸馏机制的理解，具有学术价值。这有助于指导蒸馏模型设计，提升其鲁棒性和泛化能力；局限性包括分析模型范围有限，未来工作可扩展研究到更多架构和任务。

title: MTVCraft: Tokenizing 4D Motion for Arbitrary Character Animation
abstract: Character image animation has rapidly advanced with the rise of digital humans. However, existing methods rely largely on 2D-rendered pose images for motion guidance, which limits generalization and discards essential 4D information for open-world animation. To address this, we propose MTVCraft (Motion Tokenization Video Crafter), the first framework that directly models raw 3D motion sequences (i.e., 4D motion) for character image animation. Specifically, we introduce 4DMoT (4D motion tokenizer) to quantize 3D motion sequences into 4D motion tokens. Compared to 2D-rendered pose images, 4D motion tokens offer more robust spatial-temporal cues and avoid strict pixel-level alignment between pose images and the character, enabling more flexible and disentangled control. Next, we introduce MV-DiT (Motion-aware Video DiT). By designing unique motion attention with 4D positional encodings, MV-DiT can effectively leverage motion tokens as 4D compact yet expressive context for character image animation in the complex 4D world. We implement MTVCraft on both CogVideoX-5B (small scale) and Wan-2.1-14B (large scale), demonstrating that our framework is easily scalable and can be applied to models of varying sizes. Experiments on the TikTok and Fashion benchmarks demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, powered by robust motion tokens, MTVCraft showcases unparalleled zero-shot generalization. It can animate arbitrary characters in full-body and half-body forms, and even non-human objects across diverse styles and scenarios. Hence, it marks a significant step forward in this field and opens a new direction for pose-guided video generation. Our project page is available at https://github.com/DINGYANB/MTVCrafter. A scaled version has been commercially deployed and is available at https://telestudio.teleagi.cn/generatevideo/creativeWorkshop.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MTVCraft框架，首次通过token化4D motion来驱动任意字符动画，显著提升泛化能力和控制灵活性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着数字人类的兴起，字符图像动画技术迅速发展，但现有方法主要依赖2D渲染的姿态图像进行运动指导。这导致模型泛化能力受限，丢弃了开放世界动画必需的4D信息（时空线索），并因像素级对齐问题造成灵活性不足。现有技术难以处理复杂场景和多样字符，限制了实际应用。因此，开发能直接建模4D运动的方法至关重要，以解决泛化差和信息丢失的痛点。
light_analysis.method: MTVCraft框架核心包括4DMoT（4D motion tokenizer）和MV-DiT（Motion-aware Video DiT）。4DMoT将原始3D运动序列量化为4D运动tokens，提供鲁棒的时空线索并避免像素级对齐。MV-DiT设计独特的运动注意力机制，结合4D位置编码，将tokens作为紧凑的表达性上下文，驱动字符图像动画。该框架在CogVideoX-5B和Wan-2.1-14B模型上实现，展示了良好的可扩展性和适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在TikTok和Fashion基准测试中，MTVCraft取得了最先进的性能，但摘要未明确说明具体准确率或效率提升数据。实验展示了出色的零样本泛化能力，能够动画化任意字符（包括全身和半身形式）以及非人类对象，在多样风格和场景中表现优异。这表明框架在泛化和灵活性方面优于现有基于2D姿态图像的方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MTVCraft通过token化4D运动，为字符图像动画领域带来了显著进步，提升了泛化能力和控制灵活性。其学术价值在于开辟了基于4D运动建模的新方向，对姿势引导视频生成具有重要意义。实际应用上，已实现商业部署（如telestudio平台），展示了广泛潜力。未来工作可优化模型效率并扩展应用场景，推动更开放的动画系统发展。

title: ScaleGNN: Towards Scalable Graph Neural Networks via Adaptive High-order Neighboring Feature Fusion
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated impressive performance across diverse graph-based tasks by leveraging message passing to capture complex node relationships. However, on large-scale real-world graphs, GNNs face two major challenges: (1) GNNs struggle to ensure scalability and efficiency as repeated aggregation of large neighborhoods incurs significant computational overhead; (2) GNNs suffer from over-smoothing, where excessive propagation makes node representations indistinguishable, hindering model expressiveness. To tackle these, we propose ScaleGNN, which adaptively fuses multi-hop node features for scalable and effective graph learning. We first compute per-hop pure-neighbor matrices to isolate exclusive structural signals, then apply lightweight fusion to balance low- and high-order information, preserving both local detail and global correlations. To curb redundancy and over-smoothing, we introduce Local Contribution Score (LCS)-based masking to prune low-relevance high-order neighbors, and impose learnable sparsity to selectively integrate valuable multi-hop features. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show that ScaleGNN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GNNs in both predictive accuracy and computational efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: ScaleGNN通过自适应融合多跳节点特征，提升了图神经网络的可扩展性并缓解了过平滑问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络在处理大规模真实图时面临可扩展性差和过平滑的挑战。现有方法因重复聚合大邻域导致计算开销巨大，且过度传播使节点表示趋于一致，限制了模型表达能力，这些问题阻碍了GNNs在真实场景中的高效应用。
light_analysis.method: ScaleGNN采用自适应融合多跳特征的方法，首先计算每跳纯邻居矩阵以隔离结构信号，然后通过轻量级融合平衡低阶和高阶信息，保留局部细节和全局相关性。为控制冗余和过平滑，引入基于局部贡献分数的掩码来修剪低相关高阶邻居，并施加可学习稀疏性以选择性整合有价值特征。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据集上的广泛实验显示，ScaleGNN在预测准确性和计算效率方面都优于当前最先进的图神经网络。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但与基线方法对比表明其具有一致性优越性能，验证了该方法在提升可扩展性和抗过平滑方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScaleGNN通过自适应融合多跳特征，有效解决了图神经网络的可扩展性和过平滑问题，为图学习提供了更高效、表达力强的模型。该研究具有重要学术和实际应用价值，未来可能扩展到更多复杂图任务或进一步优化算法。

title: LEL: Lipschitz Continuity Constrained Ensemble Learning for Efficient EEG-Based Intra-subject Emotion Recognition
abstract: Accurate and efficient recognition of emotional states is critical for human social functioning, and impairments in this ability are associated with significant psychosocial difficulties. While electroencephalography (EEG) offers a powerful tool for objective emotion detection, existing EEG-based Emotion Recognition (EER) methods suffer from three key limitations: (1) insufficient model stability, (2) limited accuracy in processing high-dimensional nonlinear EEG signals, and (3) poor robustness against intra-subject variability and signal noise. To address these challenges, we introduce Lipschitz continuity-constrained Ensemble Learning (LEL), a novel framework that enhances EEG-based emotion recognition by enforcing Lipschitz continuity constraints on Transformer-based attention mechanisms, spectral extraction, and normalization modules. This constraint ensures model stability, reduces sensitivity to signal variability and noise, and improves generalization capability. Additionally, LEL employs a learnable ensemble fusion strategy that optimally combines decisions from multiple heterogeneous classifiers to mitigate single-model bias and variance. Extensive experiments on three public benchmark datasets (EAV, FACED, and SEED) demonstrate superior performance, achieving average recognition accuracies of 74.25%, 81.19%, and 86.79%, respectively. The official implementation codes are available at https://github.com/NZWANG/LEL.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出LEL框架，通过结合Lipschitz连续性约束和集成学习，提升了基于EEG的情绪识别效率和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确高效的情绪识别对人类社交功能至关重要，脑电图是客观情绪检测的强大工具。然而，现有方法面临三个关键挑战：模型稳定性不足，导致性能波动；处理高维非线性EEG信号时准确性有限，影响识别效果；以及对个体内变异性和信号噪声的鲁棒性差，降低了实用性。这些问题阻碍了EEG情绪识别的广泛应用，因此研究旨在开发更稳定、精确和鲁棒的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入Lipschitz连续性约束的集成学习框架，核心方法包括在Transformer-based注意力机制、频谱提取和归一化模块中施加Lipschitz约束，以增强模型稳定性、减少对信号变化的敏感性并提高泛化能力。同时，采用可学习的集成融合策略，结合多个异构分类器的决策，以缓解单个模型的偏差和方差。该方法在公开基准数据集上进行实验，关键技术包括约束的数学实现和融合策略的优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验在三个公共基准数据集上进行，LEL框架在EAV、FACED和SEED数据集上分别实现了平均识别准确率74.25%、81.19%和86.79%。摘要表明该方法取得了卓越性能，但未明确说明具体基线对比数据，可推断其在多个数据集上均优于现有方法，展现了高效性和鲁棒性，为EEG情绪识别提供了有效基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: LEL框架通过引入Lipschitz连续性约束和集成学习，显著提升了基于EEG的情绪识别的准确性和稳定性，具有重要学术和实际应用价值，如改进人机交互和心理健康监测。未来工作方向可能包括进一步优化约束策略或扩展到多模态情绪识别，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Point-based Instance Completion with Scene Constraints
abstract: Recent point-based object completion methods have demonstrated the ability to accurately recover the missing geometry of partially observed objects. However, these approaches are not well-suited for completing objects within a scene, as they do not consider known scene constraints (e.g., other observed surfaces) in their completions and further expect the partial input to be in a canonical coordinate system, which does not hold for objects within scenes. While instance scene completion methods have been proposed for completing objects within a scene, they lag behind point-based object completion methods in terms of object completion quality and still do not consider known scene constraints during completion. To overcome these limitations, we propose a point cloud-based instance completion model that can robustly complete objects at arbitrary scales and pose in the scene. To enable reasoning at the scene level, we introduce a sparse set of scene constraints represented as point clouds and integrate them into our completion model via a cross-attention mechanism. To evaluate the instance scene completion task on indoor scenes, we further build a new dataset called ScanWCF, which contains labeled partial scans as well as aligned ground truth scene completions that are watertight and collision-free. Through several experiments, we demonstrate that our method achieves improved fidelity to partial scans, higher completion quality, and greater plausibility over existing state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种结合场景约束的基于点云实例补全模型，以提升场景中对象的补全质量和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决场景中对象补全的实际问题。现有基于点的对象补全方法未考虑场景约束（如其他观测表面），且假设输入在规范坐标系中，这不适用于动态场景中的对象。虽然实例场景补全方法已被提出，但其补全质量较低，同样忽略了场景约束，导致补全结果不切实际。因此，开发一种能有效融合场景信息的补全方法至关重要，以推动机器人、增强现实等应用的发展。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一种基于点云的实例补全模型，能够鲁棒地处理场景中任意尺度和姿态的对象。核心创新点在于引入稀疏的场景约束作为点云表示，并通过交叉注意力机制将这些约束集成到补全模型中，实现场景级推理。此外，为评估方法在室内场景的性能，构建了新数据集ScanWCF，其中包含标注的部分扫描和对齐的、水密且无碰撞的真实补全数据，以支持全面实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在保真度、补全质量和合理性方面优于现有最先进方法。通过多项实验验证，模型能更好地保持部分扫描的细节，提供更高补全质量，并确保补全结果在场景中的自然性。虽然摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但对比基线方法显示显著改进，验证了结合场景约束的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种结合场景约束的基于点云实例补全模型，显著提高了场景中对象的补全效果。该方法通过交叉注意力机制有效利用场景信息，具有学术价值，推动了场景理解和几何补全领域的发展，实际应用潜力包括机器人导航和虚拟现实。未来工作可扩展模型到更复杂场景或优化计算效率。

title: Climplicit: Climatic Implicit Embeddings for Global Ecological Tasks
abstract: Deep learning on climatic data holds potential for macroecological applications. However, its adoption remains limited among scientists outside the deep learning community due to storage, compute, and technical expertise barriers. To address this, we introduce Climplicit, a spatio-temporal geolocation encoder pretrained to generate implicit climatic representations anywhere on Earth. By bypassing the need to download raw climatic rasters and train feature extractors, our model uses x3500 less disk space and significantly reduces computational needs for downstream tasks. We evaluate our Climplicit embeddings on biomes classification, species distribution modeling, and plant trait regression. We find that single-layer probing our Climplicit embeddings consistently performs better or on par with training a model from scratch on downstream tasks and overall better than alternative geolocation encoding models.
comment: Published as a workshop paper at "Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning", ICLR 2025

light_analysis.overview: Climplicit 是一个预训练的时空地理编码器，通过生成隐式气候表示，极大减少了生态任务中的存储和计算需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习在气候数据处理中展现巨大潜力，特别适用于宏观生态学研究。然而，由于需要大量存储空间下载原始气候数据、高计算资源训练模型以及深度学习专业知识，许多生态学家难以采用这些技术。现有方法通常涉及下载庞大的气候光栅文件并训练复杂的特征提取器，这不仅耗时耗力，还增加了技术门槛。因此，开发一种更高效、易用的气候数据表示方法至关重要，以促进跨学科研究和降低应用障碍。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出 Climplicit，一个预训练的时空地理编码器，专门用于生成全球范围内的隐式气候嵌入。该模型通过隐式表示技术，避免了传统方法中下载和处理原始气候光栅数据的需求，直接编码地理坐标为气候特征。关键创新在于生成紧凑的嵌入向量，大幅减少了下游任务的计算负担和存储成本。虽然摘要未明确说明具体模型架构和预训练数据集，但强调了其高效性，使用 x3500 更少的磁盘空间。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Climplicit 嵌入在多个生态任务中表现优异。在生物群落分类、物种分布建模和植物性状回归中，使用单层探测的 Climplicit 嵌入始终达到与从头训练模型相当或更优的性能。具体来说，该方法需要比传统方式少 x3500 的磁盘空间，显著降低了存储需求。与现有地理编码模型相比，Climplicit 在准确性和效率上均有优势，证实了其在生态应用中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Climplicit 的主要贡献在于开发了一个预训练的时空地理编码器，通过隐式气候表示简化了气候数据访问。这不仅减少了存储和计算开销，还使非专家科学家能够更容易地应用深度学习于生态研究。学术上，它促进了跨学科合作；实践上，为全球生态任务提供了高效工具。局限性方面，摘要未明确说明未来工作方向，但可能包括扩展到更多气候变量或集成其他数据类型以进一步提升性能。

title: Causal Retrieval with Semantic Consideration
abstract: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have significantly enhanced the performance of conversational AI systems. To extend their capabilities to knowledge-intensive domains such as biomedical and legal fields, where the accuracy is critical, LLMs are often combined with information retrieval (IR) systems to generate responses based on retrieved documents. However, for IR systems to effectively support such applications, they must go beyond simple semantic matching and accurately capture diverse query intents, including causal relationships. Existing IR models primarily focus on retrieving documents based on surface-level semantic similarity, overlooking deeper relational structures such as causality. To address this, we propose CAWAI, a retrieval model that is trained with dual objectives: semantic and causal relations. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that CAWAI outperforms various models on diverse causal retrieval tasks especially under large-scale retrieval settings. We also show that CAWAI exhibits strong zero-shot generalization across scientific domain QA tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了CAWAI模型，通过语义和因果关系的双重目标训练，提升了检索系统在知识密集型领域的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于大语言模型（LLMs）结合信息检索（IR）系统在生物医学、法律等知识密集型领域的应用，这些领域对准确性要求极高。现有IR模型主要依赖表面语义相似性进行文档检索，忽略了因果等深层关系结构，导致无法有效捕获多样化查询意图，限制了其在复杂场景下的应用效果。这一问题的重要性在于，准确理解查询中的因果关系对于提高响应质量和可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出CAWAI检索模型，采用语义和因果关系的双重目标进行训练。关键创新点在于将因果结构融入模型训练过程，以弥补传统IR模型只关注语义匹配的不足。通过这种方式，模型能够同时考虑文档的语义相似性和因果关系，从而更准确地检索相关文档。摘要未明确说明具体的数据集、模型架构或训练细节，但强调了双重目标的设计理念。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，CAWAI在多种因果检索任务中表现优于多个基线模型，尤其是在大规模检索设置下效果显著，展示了其在复杂环境中的鲁棒性。此外，模型在科学领域QA任务中展现出强大的零样本泛化能力，表明其具有良好的跨领域适应性。摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据（如准确率或召回率），但通过与各种模型的对比，突出了CAWAI的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了CAWAI模型，通过融合语义和因果关系，提高了检索系统的准确性和泛化能力。其学术价值在于探索了IR系统中深层关系理解的新方向，推动了该领域的技术发展；实际应用价值体现在生物医学和法律等知识密集型领域，有望提升对话AI系统的性能。潜在局限性可能包括对更多关系类型的扩展不足，未来工作可考虑进一步优化模型或应用到更广泛的任务中。

title: More Bang for the Buck: Process Reward Modeling with Entropy-Driven Uncertainty
abstract: We introduce the Entropy-Driven Uncertainty Process Reward Model (EDU-PRM), a novel entropy-driven training framework for process reward modeling that enables dynamic, uncertainty-aligned segmentation of complex reasoning steps, eliminating the need for costly manual step annotations. Unlike previous Process Reward Models (PRMs) that rely on static partitioning and human labeling, EDU-PRM automatically anchors step boundaries at tokens with high predictive entropy, effectively capturing intrinsic logical transitions and facilitating efficient exploration of diverse reasoning paths. On the ProcessBench benchmark, EDU-PRM outperforms strong public PRM baselines, such as Math-Shepherd PRM and Omega PRM, and EDU-PRM achieves comparable results with SOTA models while only using 1.5% training data. Furthermore, by leveraging our proposed EDU sampling strategy, we observe accuracy boosts from 64.7% to 67.3% for generative reasoning tasks, accompanied by a reduction of 32% in token usage. These findings underscore the potential of EDU-PRM as a scalable and annotation-efficient paradigm for process supervision in mathematical reasoning, paving the way for more efficient and robust approaches to complex mathematical problem solving.

light_analysis.overview: EDU-PRM是一种新颖的熵驱动过程奖励建模框架，通过动态不确定性对齐的分割推理步骤，减少人工标注并提高推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决过程奖励建模中依赖静态分割和昂贵人工标注的问题。现有方法如Math-Shepherd PRM和Omega PRM在复杂推理任务中效率低下，增加了成本并限制了可扩展性。通过引入自动分割机制，EDU-PRM致力于提供更高效的过程监督，以减少标注负担并提升模型在数学推理等领域的适用性，推动更灵活的推理方法发展。
light_analysis.method: EDU-PRM的核心方法是一个基于熵驱动的训练框架，通过分析预测熵高的令牌来动态锚定推理步骤的边界，从而自动分割复杂推理过程。这种方法能有效捕获内在逻辑过渡，促进多样化推理路径的探索，无需依赖手动步骤标注。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构，但暗示了使用概率模型和不确定性对齐技术，专注于减少训练数据需求和提高推理效率。
light_analysis.result: 在ProcessBench基准测试中，EDU-PRM显著优于强基线模型如Math-Shepherd PRM和Omega PRM。仅使用1.5%的训练数据，它就取得了与最先进模型相当的性能。通过提出的EDU采样策略，生成推理任务的准确率从64.7%提升至67.3%，同时令牌使用量减少了32%，表明该方法在提高准确性和降低计算成本方面具有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: EDU-PRM的主要贡献是提供了一个可扩展且标注高效的过程奖励建模范式，通过熵驱动不确定性实现动态推理步骤分割。这项研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了复杂数学问题解决的更高效和鲁棒方法。实际应用中，它可减少人工依赖并提升推理系统的性能。未来工作可能包括扩展其他领域或改进不确定性估计机制，摘要未明确说明具体局限，但暗示了潜在的数据效率和通用性探索方向。

title: Towards Generalizable Forgery Detection and Reasoning
abstract: Accurate and interpretable detection of AI-generated images is essential for mitigating risks associated with AI misuse. However, the substantial domain gap among generative models makes it challenging to develop a generalizable forgery detection model. Moreover, since every pixel in an AI-generated image is synthesized, traditional saliency-based forgery explanation methods are not well suited for this task. To address these challenges, we formulate detection and explanation as a unified Forgery Detection and Reasoning task (FDR-Task), leveraging Multi-Modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to provide accurate detection through reliable reasoning over forgery attributes. To facilitate this task, we introduce the Multi-Modal Forgery Reasoning dataset (MMFR-Dataset), a large-scale dataset containing 120K images across 10 generative models, with 378K reasoning annotations on forgery attributes, enabling comprehensive evaluation of the FDR-Task. Furthermore, we propose FakeReasoning, a forgery detection and reasoning framework with three key components: 1) a dual-branch visual encoder that integrates CLIP and DINO to capture both high-level semantics and low-level artifacts; 2) a Forgery-Aware Feature Fusion Module that leverages DINO's attention maps and cross-attention mechanisms to guide MLLMs toward forgery-related clues; 3) a Classification Probability Mapper that couples language modeling and forgery detection, enhancing overall performance. Experiments across multiple generative models demonstrate that FakeReasoning not only achieves robust generalization but also outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both detection and reasoning tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一的伪造检测与推理任务（FDR-Task），并基于多模态大语言模型开发了FakeReasoning框架，实现了泛化检测和解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决AI生成图像的准确和可解释检测问题，这对减轻AI滥用风险至关重要。现有方法面临生成模型间领域差异导致的泛化困难，且传统基于显著性的解释方法不适用于全像素合成的AI图像，因为这些方法无法有效捕捉伪造属性，限制了检测模型的可靠性和应用范围。
light_analysis.method: 论文将检测和解释统一为FDR-Task，利用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）进行伪造属性推理。核心方法FakeReasoning包括三个组件：1）双分支视觉编码器集成CLIP和DINO，捕获高级语义和低级伪影；2）伪造感知特征融合模块利用DINO注意图和交叉注意机制引导MLLMs关注伪造线索；3）分类概率映射器结合语言建模与检测任务。支持的大规模数据集MMFR-Dataset包含120K图像和378K标注，用于全面评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个生成模型上进行，FakeReasoning展现出稳健的泛化能力，在检测和推理任务上均优于最先进方法。尽管摘要未给出具体准确率数据，但表明其在泛化性和性能上有显著提升，有效应对多样化生成模型的挑战，验证了框架的实用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出了FDR-Task和FakeReasoning框架，解决了AI伪造检测的泛化和解释问题。学术上，推动了多模态AI和伪造检测领域的发展；实际上，为减轻AI滥用风险提供了可靠工具。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多生成模型或提升推理效率，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: More Women, Same Stereotypes: Unpacking the Gender Bias Paradox in Large Language Models
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized natural language processing, yet concerns persist regarding their tendency to reflect or amplify social biases. This study introduces a novel evaluation framework to uncover gender biases in LLMs: using free-form storytelling to surface biases embedded within the models. A systematic analysis of ten prominent LLMs shows a consistent pattern of overrepresenting female characters across occupations, likely due to supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). Paradoxically, despite this overrepresentation, the occupational gender distributions produced by these LLMs align more closely with human stereotypes than with real-world labor data. This highlights the challenge and importance of implementing balanced mitigation measures to promote fairness and prevent the establishment of potentially new biases. We release the prompts and LLM-generated stories at GitHub.

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入了一个新颖的评估框架，通过自由形式讲故事揭示大型语言模型中女性角色过度代表但职业分布更接近刻板印象的性别偏见悖论。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在自然语言处理领域取得革命性进展，但持续存在反映或放大社会偏见的担忧。本研究旨在解决LLMs中性别偏见的评估问题，该问题的重要性在于偏见可能影响AI应用的公平性，并强化现实世界的刻板印象。现有评估方法可能不足以深入探测模型内部嵌入的偏见，特别是在生成性任务中，因此需要创新的框架来全面揭示这些潜在问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出使用自由形式讲故事作为评估工具，通过生成故事来表面LLMs中的性别偏见。研究系统分析了十个主流LLMs，关键创新在于这种叙事式评估方法，能自然地引出模型对性别的刻板印象。技术路线涉及利用监督微调（SFT）和人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）的效应分析，以探究偏见来源，数据集基于在GitHub上发布的提示和模型生成的故事。
light_analysis.result: 通过对十个LLMs的系统分析，研究发现女性角色在多种职业中表现出过度代表的现象，这可能源于SFT和RLHF过程。然而，这些模型生成的职业性别分布与人类刻板印象更为一致，而非实际劳动力统计数据，揭示了一个悖论：尽管女性角色数量增多，但刻板印象依然存在。研究强调了与真实世界数据对比的差异，但没有提供具体数值来支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于揭示了LLMs中性别偏见的悖论，并强调了实施平衡缓解措施以促进公平性的挑战。其学术价值在于提供了一种创新的偏见评估框架，推动AI公平性研究；实际应用价值在于帮助开发者识别和减少偏见，防止新偏见的建立。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括扩展到其他偏见类型或更广泛的模型评估。

title: HaLoRA: Hardware-aware Low-Rank Adaptation for Large Language Models Based on Hybrid Compute-in-Memory Architecture
abstract: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) is a predominant parameter-efficient finetuning method for adapting large language models (LLMs) to downstream tasks. Meanwhile, Compute-in-Memory (CIM) architectures demonstrate superior energy efficiency due to their array-level parallel in-memory computing designs. In this paper, we propose deploying the LoRA-finetuned LLMs on the hybrid CIM architecture (i.e., pretrained weights onto energy-efficient Resistive Random-Access Memory (RRAM) and LoRA branches onto noise-free Static Random-Access Memory (SRAM)), reducing the energy cost to about 3\% compared to the Nvidia A100 GPU. However, the inherent noise of RRAM on the saved weights leads to performance degradation, simultaneously. To address this issue, we design a novel Hardware-aware Low-rank Adaptation (HaLoRA) method. The key insight is to train a LoRA branch that is robust toward such noise and then deploy it on noise-free SRAM, while the extra cost is negligible since the parameters of LoRAs are much fewer than pretrained weights (e.g., 0.15\% for LLaMA-3.2 1B model). To improve the robustness towards the noise, we theoretically analyze the gap between the optimization trajectories of the LoRA branch under both ideal and noisy conditions and further design an extra loss to minimize the upper bound of this gap. Therefore, we can enjoy both energy efficiency and accuracy during inference. Experiments finetuning the Qwen and LLaMA series demonstrate the effectiveness of HaLoRA across multiple reasoning tasks, achieving up to \textbf{22.7} improvement in average score while maintaining robustness at various noise types and noise levels.
comment: 22 pages, Accepted by TODAES (ACM Transactions on Design Automation of Electronic Systems)

light_analysis.overview: HaLoRA 是一种硬件感知的低秩适应方法，基于混合计算内存储架构，通过训练噪声鲁棒的 LoRA 分支以同时提升大语言模型推理的能效和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA 作为主流参数高效微调方法，常用于适配大语言模型到下游任务；计算内存储架构因其阵列级并行计算设计展现出高能效，但混合架构中预训练权重存储在 RRAM 上时，固有噪声会导致模型性能下降，限制了实际应用。因此，需解决噪声问题以充分利用 CIM 架构的能效优势，弥补现有部署方法在噪声环境下的不足。
light_analysis.method: 作者提出 HaLoRA 方法，通过理论分析 LoRA 分支在理想和噪声条件下的优化轨迹差距，并设计额外损失最小化该差距的上界，以训练对 RRAM 噪声鲁棒的 LoRA 分支。该分支部署在无噪声的 SRAM 上，预训练权重保留在能效高的 RRAM 中；由于 LoRA 参数远少于预训练权重（如 LLaMA-3.2 1B 模型中的 0.15%），额外训练成本可忽略，实现了软硬件协同优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验在 Qwen 和 LLaMA 系列模型上进行微调，结果显示 HaLoRA 在多个推理任务中平均得分提升高达 22.7%，并在不同噪声类型和级别下保持鲁棒性。同时，部署在混合 CIM 架构上后，能源成本降至 Nvidia A100 GPU 的约 3%，有效平衡了能效和准确性，优于基线噪声条件下的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: HaLoRA 解决了混合计算内存储架构中 RRAM 噪声导致的性能退化问题，通过硬件感知训练实现高鲁棒性和高能效，为大语言模型高效部署提供了创新方法。该研究结合软硬件设计，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力，推动绿色 AI 发展；未来可能扩展至更广泛噪声模型或硬件平台。

title: Unveiling Downstream Performance Scaling of LLMs: A Clustering-Based Perspective
abstract: The escalating scale and cost of Large Language Models (LLMs) training necessitate accurate pre-training prediction of downstream task performance for comprehensive understanding of scaling properties. This is challenged by: 1) the emergence phenomenon, where unpredictable capabilities appearing suddenly at critical model scales; and 2) uneven task difficulty and inconsistent performance scaling patterns, leading to high metric variability. Current prediction methods lack accuracy and reliability. We propose a Clustering-On-Difficulty (COD) framework for downstream performance prediction. The COD framework clusters tasks by their difficulty scaling features, thereby constructing a more stable and predictable task subset that exhibits well-behaved scaling characteristics with the increase of compute budget. We adopt a performance scaling law to predict cluster-wise performance with theoretical support. Predictable subset performance acts as an intermediate predictor for the full evaluation set. We further derive a mapping function to accurately extrapolate the performance of the subset to the full set. Applied to an LLM with 70B parameters, COD achieved a 1.55\% average prediction error across eight key LLM benchmarks, thus providing actionable insights for scaling properties and training monitoring during LLM pre-training.
comment: Accepted by The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR2026)

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Clustering-On-Difficulty (COD)框架，通过任务聚类提高大语言模型下游性能预测的准确性，解决了现有方法预测不稳定的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型训练规模和成本的不断增加，准确预测下游任务性能对于理解模型缩放属性至关重要。然而，现有预测方法面临挑战：首先，emergence现象导致模型能力在关键规模时突然出现，难以预测；其次，任务难度不均和性能缩放模式不一致，引入了高变异性，使得预测结果不准确且不可靠。这些问题限制了模型训练优化和资源分配效率，亟需更有效的预测框架。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了Clustering-On-Difficulty (COD)框架，核心方法是首先根据任务的难度缩放特征进行聚类，构建一个稳定且可预测的任务子集，该子集随计算预算增加展现出良好的缩放特性。然后，采用性能缩放定律的理论支持来预测聚类性能，并将可预测子集作为中间预测器。最后，通过推导映射函数，将子集性能准确外推到整个评估集，以覆盖所有任务变异性。关键创新点在于结合聚类和缩放定律来增强预测稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在应用于拥有70B参数的大语言模型时，COD框架在八个关键LLM基准上实现了1.55%的平均预测误差，显著降低了预测错误。相比现有方法缺乏准确性，该结果验证了COD框架在高变异性任务中的有效性，通过任务聚类和缩放定律应用，成功控制了预测误差，提供了可靠的性能预测指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提供了一种可靠的COD框架，增强了LLM下游性能预测的准确性，为理解模型缩放属性和训练监控提供了实用工具。它的学术价值在于整合聚类和缩放定律来解决预测挑战，实际应用价值在于优化模型训练和资源分配。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但该方法有望促进更高效的模型开发。

title: Quantifying Information Loss under Coarse-Grained Partitions: A Discrete Framework for Explainable Artificial Intelligence
abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly used in ethically sensitive domains such as education, healthcare, and transportation, balancing accuracy and interpretability has become a central concern. Coarse ethics (CE) motivates coarse-grained evaluations under cognitive, institutional, and contextual constraints, but it still lacks a simple mathematical formalization of admissible coarse-graining and its informational consequences. This paper introduces coarse-grained partitions (CGPs) as a discrete framework for modeling coarse evaluation on a finite totally ordered score scale. A CGP represents coarse evaluation as a partition into grains with an index assignment, and induces a coarse-grained distribution by pushforward. To compare admissible coarse-grainings, we introduce categorical unification (CU), which constructs a canonical fine-scale reconstruction from the coarse representation under minimal assumptions. On this basis, we define a KL-based measure of information loss, $D_{\mathrm{KL\text{-}CU}}$, as the divergence between the original fine-grained distribution and its CU-based reconstruction. We prove that $D_{\mathrm{KL\text{-}CU}}=0$ if and only if the original distribution is already uniform within each grain. This shows that zero loss, in the sense of the proposed measure, is a highly exceptional limiting case rather than a realistic benchmark for ordinary evaluative practice. We also show that the framework leads naturally to an optimization problem for comparing alternative admissible CGPs. Applications to educational grading and explainable AI (XAI) illustrate how the framework clarifies trade-offs among informational fidelity, interpretability, and coarsening cost.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一个基于粗粒度分区的离散框架，用于量化信息损失，并应用于可解释人工智能以平衡准确性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着人工智能在教育和医疗等敏感领域的应用增加，平衡准确性与可解释性成为关键挑战。粗粒伦理强调在认知、制度和上下文约束下进行粗粒度评估，但现有方法缺乏对可容许粗粒度及其信息后果的简单数学形式化，导致评估实践中的不确定性和信息损失量化困难。因此，研究旨在解决如何数学化评估粗粒度信息损失的问题，为可解释AI提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入了粗粒度分区作为离散框架，在有限全序分数尺度上建模粗粒度评估。CGP通过索引分配将评估分区为粒，并利用推前操作生成粗粒度分布。关键创新是引入类别统一方法，在最小假设下从粗表示构建规范细粒度重建，并定义基于KL散度的信息损失度量$D_{\mathrm{KL\text{-}CU}}$，以量化原始分布与重建之间的差异。该框架不依赖于具体数据集或模型架构，专注于数学形式化和通用性。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果表明，在定义的度量下，信息损失$D_{\mathrm{KL\text{-}CU}}=0$当且仅当原始分布在每个粒内均匀分布，这证明了零损失是高度异常的极限情况，而非普通评估实践的实用基准。框架自然导出比较替代可容许粗粒度分区的优化问题。摘要未明确提供具体实验数据，但通过教育评分和可解释AI应用展示了信息保真度、可解释性和粗化成本之间的权衡分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提供了一个数学框架来量化粗粒度评估中的信息损失，帮助在可解释AI中平衡信息保真度和可解释性。学术价值在于形式化了粗粒伦理的概念，实际应用价值体现在教育评分和AI系统解释中，指导决策者进行更有效的评估设计。未来工作可能包括扩展框架到更复杂的分布或与其他可解释性技术结合，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Prompt-SID: Learning Structural Representation Prompt via Latent Diffusion for Single-Image Denoising
abstract: Many studies have concentrated on constructing supervised models utilizing paired datasets for image denoising, which proves to be expensive and time-consuming. Current self-supervised and unsupervised approaches typically rely on blind-spot networks or sub-image pairs sampling, resulting in pixel information loss and destruction of detailed structural information, thereby significantly constraining the efficacy of such methods. In this paper, we introduce Prompt-SID, a prompt-learning-based single image denoising framework that emphasizes preserving of structural details. This approach is trained in a self-supervised manner using downsampled image pairs. It captures original-scale image information through structural encoding and integrates this prompt into the denoiser. To achieve this, we propose a structural representation generation model based on the latent diffusion process and design a structural attention module within the transformer-based denoiser architecture to decode the prompt. Additionally, we introduce a scale replay training mechanism, which effectively mitigates the scale gap from images of different resolutions. We conduct comprehensive experiments on synthetic, real-world, and fluorescence imaging datasets, showcasing the remarkable effectiveness of Prompt-SID. Our code will be released at https://github.com/huaqlili/Prompt-SID.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prompt-SID框架，通过潜在扩散学习结构表示提示，以自监督方式实现单图像去噪，有效保留图像结构细节。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前图像去噪方法面临挑战：监督方法依赖昂贵的配对数据集，成本高且耗时；而自监督和无监督方法（如盲点网络或子图像采样）常导致像素信息丢失和结构细节破坏，限制了其效能。因此，需要开发一种能克服这些缺陷、在无需大量标注数据情况下保留结构细节的去噪方法，以提升图像质量并降低实际应用中的资源需求。
light_analysis.method: 方法核心包括：首先，基于潜在扩散过程构建结构表示生成模型，以捕捉原始尺度图像信息并生成结构提示；其次，设计一个基于Transformer的去噪器架构，其中集成结构注意力模块，用于解码该提示并增强对细节的处理能力；此外，引入尺度重放训练机制，通过使用不同分辨率的下采样图像对进行自监督训练，有效缓解尺度差异问题，提升模型泛化性，从而避免对配对数据集的依赖。
light_analysis.result: 论文在合成、真实世界和荧光成像数据集上进行了全面实验，结果显示Prompt-SID展现出显著有效性，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进。实验表明，该方法在多个数据集上均表现出优异去噪效果，与现有基线方法相比，能更好地保留结构细节，证明了其在实际应用中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了Prompt-SID框架，通过结合潜在扩散和提示学习，以自监督方式解决单图像去噪中的结构细节保留问题，学术价值在于创新性地引入结构注意力机制和尺度训练策略，实际应用价值在于降低数据收集成本并提升去噪质量。未来工作可能涉及进一步优化模型架构或扩展到其他图像处理任务，如超分辨率或图像增强。

title: Mitigating Unintended Memorization with LoRA in Federated Learning for LLMs
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a popular paradigm for collaborative training which avoids direct data exposure between clients. However, data privacy issues still remain: FL-trained large language models are capable of memorizing and completing phrases and sentences contained in training data when given their prefixes. Thus, it is possible for adversarial and honest- but-curious clients to recover training data of other participants simply through targeted prompting. In this work, we demonstrate that a popular and simple fine-tuning strategy, low-rank adaptation (LoRA), reduces memorization during FL by a factor of up to 10 without significant performance cost. We study this effect by performing fine-tuning tasks in high-risk domains such as medicine, law, and finance. We observe a reduction in memorization for a wide variety of model families, from 1B to 70B parameters. We find that LoRA can reduce memorization in centralized learning as well, and we compare how the memorization patterns differ. Furthermore, we study the effect of hyperparameters and show that LoRA can be combined with other privacy-preserving techniques such as gradient clipping and Gaussian noise, secure aggregation, and Goldfish loss to further improve record-level privacy while maintaining performance.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究使用低秩适应（LoRA）在联邦学习中显著减少大型语言模型的意外记忆，以提升数据隐私。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习（FL）避免直接数据暴露，但大型语言模型（LLMs）在训练时可能记忆数据，导致隐私风险。在敏感领域如医疗、法律和金融，恶意或好奇的客户端可通过针对性提示恢复其他参与者的训练数据。现有方法可能无法有效防止这种记忆，因此亟需研究减少意外记忆的技术，以保护用户隐私并确保FL在安全关键领域的适用性。摘要未明确说明现有具体方法的不足，但强调了记忆问题的普遍性和重要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出使用低秩适应（LoRA）作为微调策略来减少记忆。LoRA通过低秩矩阵适应模型参数，降低了参数更新的幅度，从而减轻记忆效应。研究在高风险领域（如医学、法律、金融）进行微调任务，覆盖从1B到70B参数的多种模型家族，并分析了LoRA与梯度裁剪、高斯噪声、安全聚合和Goldfish损失等其他隐私保护技术的结合，以优化记录级隐私。关键创新点在于LoRA简单易用，且不显著影响模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，LoRA在联邦学习中将记忆减少高达10倍，同时无显著性能损失。在多个模型（如1B到70B参数）中均观察到记忆减少。LoRA同样适用于集中学习，并能改变记忆模式。超参数研究表明，LoRA可与其他技术结合以进一步改进隐私。摘要未提供具体准确率数字，但强调了效果显著，与基线方法相比，在保持性能的同时大幅提升了隐私保护。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了LoRA在减少LLMs意外记忆方面的有效性，特别是在联邦学习环境中，为隐私保护机器学习提供实用方法。学术价值在于扩展了FL的隐私解决方案，应用价值在于适用于高风险领域，可与其他技术结合平衡隐私和性能。未来工作可能包括进一步优化超参数或探索更多技术组合。摘要未明确说明局限性，但基于内容，可能涉及对不同模型的泛化性需要更多研究。

title: Controllable Sequence Editing for Biological and Clinical Trajectories
abstract: Conditional generation models for longitudinal sequences can produce new or modified trajectories given a conditioning input. However, they often lack control over when the condition should take effect (timing) and which variables it should influence (scope). Most methods either operate only on univariate sequences or assume that the condition alters all variables and time steps. In scientific and clinical settings, interventions instead begin at a specific moment, such as the time of drug administration or surgery, and influence only a subset of measurements while the rest of the trajectory remains unchanged. CLEF learns temporal concepts that encode how and when a condition alters future sequence evolution. These concepts allow CLEF to apply targeted edits to the affected time steps and variables while preserving the rest of the sequence. We evaluate CLEF on 8 datasets spanning cellular reprogramming, patient health, and sales, comparing against 9 state-of-the-art baselines. CLEF improves immediate sequence editing accuracy by 16.28% (MAE) on average against their non-CLEF counterparts. Unlike prior models, CLEF enables one-step conditional generation at arbitrary future times, outperforming their non-CLEF counterparts in delayed sequence editing by 26.73% (MAE) on average. We test CLEF under counterfactual inference assumptions and show up to 62.84% (MAE) improvement on zero-shot conditional generation of counterfactual trajectories. In a case study of patients with type 1 diabetes mellitus, CLEF identifies clinical interventions that generate realistic counterfactual trajectories shifted toward healthier outcomes.

light_analysis.overview: CLEF模型通过学习时间概念实现了对生物和临床纵向轨迹的精确可控序列编辑，解决了现有条件生成模型缺乏时间和范围控制的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在科学和临床设置中，如药物管理或手术等干预措施通常从特定时刻开始，仅影响部分测量变量，而序列其余部分保持不变。然而，现有纵向序列的条件生成模型往往缺乏对条件作用时间（timing）和影响范围（scope）的控制，多数方法要么仅处理单变量序列，要么假设条件改变所有变量和时间步，导致在实际应用中的局限性和不精确性。
light_analysis.method: CLEF通过时间概念的学习来编码条件如何及何时改变序列的未来演变。这些概念允许模型对受影响的时步和变量进行针对性编辑，同时保持序列其他部分不变。研究在8个数据集上进行评估，涵盖细胞重编程、患者健康、销售领域，并使用9种先进基线模型作为对比，以确保方法的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.result: CLEF在即时序列编辑中平均提升了16.28%的准确率（MAE），在延迟序列编辑中提升了26.73%（MAE），在零样本反事实轨迹生成中提升高达62.84%（MAE）。与9种基线模型相比，这些改进显著，表明CLEF在多种场景下的优越性能。案例研究显示，CLEF能识别1型糖尿病患者的临床干预，生成现实的反事实轨迹朝向更健康结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: CLEF的主要贡献在于通过时间概念实现了精确可控的序列编辑，为条件生成模型在纵向序列分析中的应用提供了新方法。学术上，它增强了模型的可解释性和实用性；临床上，可用于评估干预效果，生成反事实轨迹支持医疗决策。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作方向，但暗示了广泛的应用潜力。

title: GRADIEND: Feature Learning within Neural Networks Exemplified through Biases
abstract: AI systems frequently exhibit and amplify social biases, leading to harmful consequences in critical areas. This study introduces a novel encoder-decoder approach that leverages model gradients to learn a feature neuron encoding societal bias information such as gender, race, and religion. We show that our method can not only identify which weights of a model need to be changed to modify a feature, but even demonstrate that this can be used to rewrite models to debias them while maintaining other capabilities. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach across various model architectures and highlight its potential for broader applications.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一种基于梯度学习的编码器-解码器方法，用于在神经网络中识别和去除社会偏见特征，创新性地利用模型梯度编码偏见信息。
light_analysis.motivation: AI系统在社会关键领域（如性别、种族、宗教）中经常放大偏见，导致歧视和不公平决策等有害后果。现有去偏方法可能未能深入模型内部机制，难以精确修改特定特征而不损害其他功能，因此需要一种更有效的方法来定位和纠正偏见。本研究旨在通过梯度分析学习偏见特征，以提供更精准的去偏解决方案，提升AI系统的公平性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种新颖的编码器-解码器方法，通过分析模型梯度来学习编码社会偏见信息的特征神经元。关键创新在于利用梯度信号识别神经网络中与偏见相关的权重，从而允许修改这些权重以去除偏见，同时保持模型的其他能力。方法在不同模型架构上进行测试，但摘要未明确说明具体的数据集或详细模型结构，聚焦于梯度驱动的特征学习和权重修改技术。
light_analysis.result: 研究在多种神经网络架构上演示了方法的有效性，成功识别出需要修改的权重以去除社会偏见特征。结果展示该方法能在去偏的同时维持模型的其他功能，为更广泛的应用奠定了基础。摘要未提供具体的性能指标（如准确率提升），但强调其普适性和实用性，暗示在对比中可能优于传统去偏方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出一种基于梯度学习的编码器-解码器方法，用于识别和去除神经网络中的社会偏见。学术价值在于推进了特征学习技术在偏见缓解中的应用，实际应用价值则在于帮助构建更公平的AI系统。潜在局限性未明确说明，未来工作可扩展该方法到其他偏见类型或更复杂模型中，以验证其广泛适用性。

title: The Exploration of Error Bounds in Classification with Noisy Labels
abstract: Numerous studies have shown that label noise can lead to poor generalization performance, negatively affecting classification accuracy. Therefore, understanding the effectiveness of classifiers trained using deep neural networks in the presence of noisy labels is of considerable practical significance. In this paper, we focus on the error bounds of excess risks for classification problems with noisy labels within deep learning frameworks. We derive error bounds for the excess risk, decomposing it into statistical error and approximation error. To handle statistical dependencies (e.g., mixing sequences), we employ an independent block construction to bound the error, leveraging techniques for dependent processes. For the approximation error, we establish these theoretical results to the vector-valued setting, where the output space consists of $K$-dimensional unit vectors. Finally, under the low-dimensional manifold hypothesis, we further refine the approximation error to mitigate the impact of high-dimensional input spaces.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过分解误差界为统计误差和近似误差，并利用低维流形假设细化理论结果，探索了深度学习分类中带噪声标签的理论误差界。
light_analysis.motivation: 标签噪声在分类任务中普遍存在，常导致深度学习模型泛化性能下降，严重影响实际应用的准确性。现有研究多侧重于实践策略，而缺乏对误差界理论分析的系统探讨，这限制了应对噪声标签的理论指导。因此，本研究旨在填补这一理论空白，深入理解分类器在带噪声标签环境下的有效性，为设计更鲁棒的算法提供理论支撑，具有重要的学术和实际意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种理论研究方法，核心是推导带噪声标签分类的误差界，将其分解为统计误差和近似误差两部分。为处理统计依赖（如混合序列），采用独立块构造技术来界定统计误差，这借鉴了依赖过程的技术。对于近似误差，论文将理论结果扩展到向量值设置，其中输出空间由K维单位向量构成。此外，基于低维流形假设，进一步细化近似误差的理论分析，以缓解高维输入空间带来的负面影响。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果或性能指标。论文主要贡献在于理论推导，提出了误差界的分解框架，并给出了在特定条件下的细化结果。虽然没有实验数据支撑，但理论分析为后续研究奠定了基础，并提供了处理标签噪声的潜在改进方向，可能有助于提升分类器的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是建立了带噪声标签分类的误差界理论，分解误差为统计和近似两部分，并利用低维流形假设优化了近似误差分析。这丰富了深度学习的理论框架，有助于推动更鲁棒的分类器设计。研究具有学术价值，为处理噪声标签问题提供了理论指导，同时实际应用价值在于可能降低数据标注成本。未来工作可包括实验验证、扩展到更复杂的噪声模型或结合实际数据集进行应用测试。

title: Exploring Embedding Priors in Prompt-Tuning for Improved Interpretability and Control
abstract: Prompt-Tuning is an efficient method for adapting pre-trained language models to new tasks with minimal computational overhead by modifying prompt embeddings. In this work, we investigate how crucial the phenomenon of embedding collapse, frequently observed in Prompt-Tuning, is for the final performance of the model. To address this question, we designed embedding priors and compared them with posteriors of the converged Soft and Deep Prompt-Tuning methods. Our findings suggest that priors strongly affect the position of the tuned embeddings, and models can effectively work with embeddings from different parts of activation spaces, including completely new regions. As the final Prompt-Tuning capabilities are limited, we hypothesize that controllable Prompt-Tuning posteriors may serve as a good starting point for tasks such as chain-of-thought (COT) distillation. Our experiments also show that generated trajectories are not localized in the activation space of the models. However, there are distinct clusters of activations for distant tasks (e.g., NLP and arithmetic), while activations between NLP tasks (e.g., Question-Answering and MLM) lie in the same cluster. These observations raise questions about the importance of a single activation cluster for the generalization abilities of large language models.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过设计嵌入先验并与后验比较，揭示了嵌入崩溃现象对Prompt-Tuning性能的影响，提升了方法的解释性和控制性。
light_analysis.motivation: Prompt-Tuning是一种高效适应预训练语言模型的方法，但常出现嵌入崩溃现象，其具体影响尚不明确，可能导致模型性能不稳定和解释性差。现有研究对这一现象缺乏深入分析，阻碍了Prompt-Tuning的优化和可靠应用。本研究旨在探索嵌入先验如何影响最终性能，以解决嵌入崩溃问题，并增强Prompt-Tuning的控制性和可解释性，为更精确的模型调整奠定基础。
light_analysis.method: 本研究设计嵌入先验，并将其与收敛的Soft和Deep Prompt-Tuning方法的后验进行比较，以分析嵌入崩溃现象的影响。通过实验在激活空间中考察嵌入位置和分布，研究先验对调整后嵌入的调控作用。虽然摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但推断基于典型的Prompt-Tuning框架，聚焦于嵌入空间的分析和对比，以揭示先验在优化过程中的关键角色。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，嵌入先验强烈影响调整后嵌入的位置，模型能有效处理激活空间中不同区域（包括全新区域）的嵌入。生成轨迹在激活空间中非局部化，对于不同任务（如NLP与算术）激活聚类存在明显差异，而NLP任务内部（如问答和MLM）则位于同一聚类中。这些发现揭示了先验对嵌入分布的调控作用，但具体性能指标如准确率提升摘要未明确说明，需进一步实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于揭示了嵌入先验在Prompt-Tuning中的重要性，为改善解释性和控制性提供了理论基础。可控的Prompt-Tuning后验可作为chain-of-thought蒸馏等任务的起点，具有潜在应用价值。学术上，它引发了对激活聚类与大型语言模型泛化能力关系的思考。未来工作可深入探索具体任务中的性能提升和局限性，以优化方法应用。

title: LangSurf: Language-Embedded Surface Gaussians for 3D Scene Understanding
abstract: Applying Gaussian Splatting to perception tasks for 3D scene understanding is becoming increasingly popular. Most existing works primarily focus on rendering 2D feature maps from novel viewpoints, which leads to an imprecise 3D language field with outlier languages, ultimately failing to align objects in 3D space. By utilizing masked images for feature extraction, these approaches also lack essential contextual information, leading to inaccurate feature representation. To this end, we propose a Language-Embedded Surface Field (LangSurf), which accurately aligns the 3D language fields with the surface of objects, facilitating precise 2D and 3D segmentation with text query, widely expanding the downstream tasks such as removal and editing. The core of LangSurf is a joint training strategy that flattens the language Gaussian on the object surfaces using geometry supervision and contrastive losses to assign accurate language features to the Gaussians of objects. In addition, we also introduce the Hierarchical-Context Awareness Module to extract features at the image level for contextual information then perform hierarchical mask pooling using masks segmented by SAM to obtain fine-grained language features in different hierarchies. Extensive experiments on open-vocabulary 2D and 3D semantic segmentation demonstrate that LangSurf outperforms the previous state-of-the-art method LangSplat by a large margin. As shown in Fig. 1, our method is capable of segmenting objects in 3D space, thus boosting the effectiveness of our approach in instance recognition, removal, and editing, which is also supported by comprehensive experiments. https://langsurf.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LangSurf方法，通过语言嵌入表面Gaussians实现精确的3D场景理解和文本查询分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究将Gaussian Splatting应用于3D场景理解时，主要关注从新视角渲染2D特征图，导致3D语言场不精确，存在离群语言，无法在3D空间中对齐对象。此外，使用掩蔽图像提取特征缺乏上下文信息，使特征表示不准确，限制了如移除和编辑等下游任务的发展。因此，需要一种能精确对齐语言场与对象表面的方法来解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: LangSurf采用联合训练策略，利用几何监督和对比损失将语言高斯平铺在对象表面上，为对象的高斯分配准确语言特征。同时，引入层次上下文感知模块，在图像级别提取特征以获取上下文信息，然后使用SAM分割的掩码进行层次掩码池化，获得不同层次的细粒度语言特征。这结合了语言嵌入和表面对齐，提升特征精度。
light_analysis.result: 在开放词汇2D和3D语义分割的广泛实验中，LangSurf大幅优于之前的最先进方法LangSplat，性能显著提升。方法能够分割3D空间中的对象，从而增强实例识别、移除和编辑的效果，这一结论得到综合实验支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出LangSurf方法，通过准确对齐3D语言场与对象表面，实现精确的文本查询2D和3D分割，扩展了如移除和编辑等下游任务。该研究改进了3D场景理解技术，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可进一步优化或扩展到更复杂任务。

title: Finite Sample Bounds for Non-Parametric Regression: Optimal Sample Efficiency and Space Complexity
abstract: We address the problem of learning an unknown smooth function and its derivatives from noisy pointwise evaluations under the supremum norm. While classical nonparametric regression provides a strong theoretical foundation, traditional kernel-based estimators often incur high computational costs and memory requirements that scale with the sample size, limiting their utility in real-time applications such as reinforcement learning. To overcome these challenges, we propose a parametric approach based on a finite-dimensional representation that achieves minimax-optimal uniform convergence rates. Our method enables lightweight inference without storing all samples in memory. We provide sharp finite-sample bounds under sub-Gaussian noise, derive second-order Bernstein-type guarantees, and prove matching lower bounds, thereby confirming the optimality of our approach in both estimation error and memory efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出基于有限维表示的参数方法，实现非参数回归的极小极大最优一致收敛率并优化内存效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是从噪声点状评估中学习平滑函数及其导数，采用supremum norm评估。尽管经典非参数回归提供理论基础，但传统核估计器计算成本和内存需求随样本量增长，在实时应用如强化学习中实用性受限。这凸显了开发高效方法以解决高内存占用和计算复杂度的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种参数方法，通过有限维表示来逼近未知函数，避免存储所有样本以实现轻量推理。核心创新是实现极小极大最优一致收敛率，并优化空间复杂度。关键细节包括使用参数化估计器，基于有限维表示构建，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法提供锐利有限样本界和二阶Bernstein型保证，证明匹配下界，确认在估计误差和内存效率上的最优性。与传统核估计器相比，实现了轻量推理和内存降低，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是开发参数方法，实现非参数回归的最优样本效率和空间复杂度。学术价值在于提供严格有限样本理论保证，实际应用潜力在于实时场景如强化学习。局限性可能包括对其他噪声分布的泛化能力，摘要未明确说明未来工作方向。

title: Speaker effects in language comprehension: An integrative model of language and speaker processing
abstract: The identity of a speaker influences language comprehension through modulating perception and expectation. This review explores speaker effects and proposes an integrative model of language and speaker processing that integrates distinct mechanistic perspectives. We argue that speaker effects arise from the interplay between bottom-up perception-based processes, driven by acoustic-episodic memory, and top-down expectation-based processes, driven by a speaker model. We show that language and speaker processing are functionally integrated through multi-level probabilistic processing: prior beliefs about a speaker modulate language processing at the phonetic, lexical, and semantic levels, while the unfolding speech and message continuously updates the speaker model, refining broad demographic priors into precise individualized representations. Within this framework, we distinguish between speaker-idiosyncrasy effects arising from familiarity with an individual and speaker-demographics effects arising from social group expectations. We discuss how speaker effects serve as indices for assessing language development and social cognition, and we encourage future research to extend these findings to the emerging domain of artificial intelligence (AI) speakers, as AI agents represent a new class of social interlocutors that are transforming the way we engage in daily communication.
comment: In press in Psychonomic Bulletin & Review

light_analysis.overview: 该综述论文提出了一个整合语言和说话者处理的模型，阐明了说话者身份如何通过调制感知和期望来影响语言理解的机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决说话者身份在语言理解中的作用问题，这是一个关键的认知和社会互动议题。现有方法往往从单一视角探讨说话者效应，缺乏对自下而上和自上而下过程的系统整合，导致无法全面解释语言与说话者处理的交互。该问题的重要性在于它直接关系到日常沟通效率和社会认知发展，尤其是在多元化和AI驱动的沟通环境中，需要更精细的模型来理解和预测语言理解过程。
light_analysis.method: 该综述提出了一个整合模型，结合了自下而上的基于感知过程（由声学-情景记忆驱动）和自上而下的基于期望过程（由说话者模型驱动）。核心创新在于采用多层次概率处理框架，其中说话者的先验信念在语音、词汇和语义层面调制语言处理，同时展开的语音信息持续更新说话者模型，将广泛的人口统计学先验细化成个性化表征。方法未涉及具体数据集或实验设计，但整合了多种理论视角以构建统一的机理模型。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，因为这是一篇综述论文，不包含实验数据。综述总结了说话者效应的主要机制，区分了因个体熟悉度产生的说话者-特性效应和因社会群体期望产生的说话者-人口统计学效应，并讨论了这些效应在评估语言发展和社会认知中的应用潜力。虽然没有量化性能指标，但通过理论框架的建立，为未来实证研究提供了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了一个整合语言和说话者处理的模型，统一了不同机理视角。学术价值在于为语言认知和社会互动研究提供了新框架，促进了跨领域理论发展。实际应用价值包括将说话者效应作为语言发展和社会认知的评估指标。局限性在于模型尚需实证验证，未来工作应扩展到人工智能说话者领域，以探索AI代理作为新兴社会对话伙伴的影响。

title: iLLaVA: An Image is Worth Fewer Than 1/3 Input Tokens in Large Multimodal Models
abstract: Recent methods have made notable progress in accelerating Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) by exploiting the inherent redundancy in visual inputs. Most existing approaches, however, focus narrowly on reducing image tokens before or within the Large Language Model (LLM) stage to lower computational cost. This overlooks other major bottlenecks, particularly the image encoder, which itself requires substantial computation. As a result, these methods fall short of achieving true end-to-end acceleration. Importantly, the image encoder is the primary contributor of input tokens to the LLM. Thus, reducing visual redundancy at the encoder stage not only speeds up the encoder itself but also significantly lightens the workload for the subsequent LLM. Motivated by this, we investigate how to jointly optimize the image encoder and the LLM along with other LVLM components for comprehensive acceleration. To mitigate the risk of performance degradation from token reduction, we propose a novel token merging strategy that recycles useful information from otherwise discarded tokens. Our approach, iLLaVA, delivers consistent improvements across both image and video understanding tasks, achieving up to a 2 times throughput boost and a 4 times reduction in prefilling time. Notably, iLLaVA enables a larger model (e.g., InternVL-2.5 26B) to surpass a smaller counterpart (e.g., InternVL-2.5 8B) in both accuracy and efficiency. Extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art token pruning and merging techniques demonstrate the clear superiority of our method. Finally, we provide detailed visualizations for the merging steps of iLLaVA , offering deeper insights into how different LVLM components contribute to efficient computation.
comment: Accepted by ICLR2026,code is released at https://github.com/hulianyuyy/iLLaVA

light_analysis.overview: iLLaVA方法通过联合优化图像编码器和大型语言模型，并采用令牌合并策略，实现了大型多模态模型的全面加速和性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大型视觉语言模型加速方法主要专注于减少大型语言模型阶段的图像令牌，但忽视了图像编码器的高计算成本，导致无法实现真正的端到端加速。图像编码器是输入令牌的主要来源，因此优化编码器阶段的冗余能同时加速编码器和后续处理，这对提升整体效率至关重要，因为现有方法忽略了这一关键瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: iLLaVA提出一种端到端加速框架，联合优化图像编码器、大型语言模型及其他组件。核心创新是一种令牌合并策略，通过选择性融合冗余令牌，回收被丢弃令牌的有用信息以减少计算量，避免性能下降。该方法在保持模型准确性的同时，适用于图像和视频理解任务，实现了高效计算。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，iLLaVA在图像和视频理解任务中持续改进性能，吞吐量提升高达2倍，预填充时间减少4倍。例如，InternVL-2.5 26B模型在使用iLLaVA后，在准确性和效率上均超越8B版本。与最先进的令牌修剪和合并技术相比，iLLaVA表现出明显优越性，证明了其加速效果和性能保持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了iLLaVA方法，通过联合优化和令牌合并，实现了大型多模态模型的全面加速，具有重要的学术价值，为高效计算提供了新思路。实际应用中能降低计算成本，未来工作可扩展到更多模型或任务，并进一步探索优化策略以克服潜在局限性。

title: Pose Prior Learner: Unsupervised Categorical Prior Learning for Pose Estimation
abstract: A prior represents a set of beliefs or assumptions about a system, aiding inference and decision-making. In this paper, we introduce the challenge of unsupervised categorical prior learning in pose estimation, where AI models learn a general pose prior for an object category from images in a self-supervised manner. Although priors are effective in estimating pose, acquiring them can be difficult. We propose a novel method, named Pose Prior Learner (PPL), to learn a general pose prior for any object category. PPL uses a hierarchical memory to store compositional parts of prototypical poses, from which we distill a general pose prior. This prior improves pose estimation accuracy through template transformation and image reconstruction. PPL learns meaningful pose priors without any additional human annotations or interventions, outperforming competitive baselines on both human and animal pose estimation datasets. Notably, our experimental results reveal the effectiveness of PPL using learned prototypical poses for pose estimation on occluded images. Through iterative inference, PPL leverages the pose prior to refine estimated poses, regressing them to any prototypical poses stored in memory. Our code, model, and data are publicly available at: https://github.com/ZhangLab-DeepNeuroCogLab/Pose-Prior-Learner.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了Pose Prior Learner (PPL)方法，通过无监督学习获取通用姿态先验，以提高姿态估计的准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 姿态先验在姿态估计中有效，但获取困难，通常依赖人工标注或监督学习，限制了方法的可扩展性和泛化能力。本研究旨在解决这一挑战，探索在无监督情况下学习类别姿态先验，以减少对标注数据的依赖，并提升姿态估计系统在真实场景中的实用性和鲁棒性，为计算机视觉领域提供更高效的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: PPL方法采用分层记忆结构存储对象类别的原型姿态组合部分，从中蒸馏出通用姿态先验。关键创新点包括无监督学习框架，通过模板转换和图像重建优化姿态估计，无需额外人类干预。具体技术涉及自监督学习过程，利用迭代推理细化姿态，实验在人类和动物姿态估计数据集上进行，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集名称。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，PPL在人类和动物姿态估计数据集上优于竞争基线方法，特别是在遮挡图像上的姿态估计中表现有效。通过迭代推理，PPL能够将估计的姿态回归到存储的原型姿态，提高了姿态估计的准确性和鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率数值，但强调了方法相对于基线的优越性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了PPL方法，实现了无监督姿态先验学习，增强了姿态估计的精度和适应性。其学术价值在于推动自监督学习在计算机视觉中的应用，实际应用价值包括增强现实和机器人导航等领域。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可能涉及扩展到更多对象类别或进一步优化模型效率。

title: Neural delay differential equations: learning non-Markovian closures for partially known dynamical systems
abstract: Recent advances in learning dynamical systems from data have shown significant promise. However, many existing methods assume access to the full state of the system -- an assumption that is rarely satisfied in practice, where systems are typically monitored through a limited number of sensors, leading to partial observability. To address this challenge, we draw inspiration from the Mori-Zwanzig formalism, which provides a theoretical connection between hidden variables and memory terms. Motivated by this perspective, we introduce a constant-lag Neural Delay Differential Equations (NDDEs) framework, providing a continuous-time approach for learning non-Markovian dynamics directly from data. These memory effects are captured using a finite set of time delays, which are identified via the adjoint method. We validate the proposed approach on a range of datasets, including synthetic systems, chaotic dynamics, and experimental measurements, such as the Kuramoto-Sivashinsky equation and cavity-flow experiments. Results demonstrate that NDDEs compare favourably with existing approaches for partially observed systems, including long short-term memory (LSTM) networks and augmented neural ordinary differential equations (ANODEs). Overall, NDDEs offer a principled and data-efficient framework for modelling non-Markovian dynamics under partial observability. An open-source implementation accompanies this article.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出神经延迟微分方程（NDDEs）框架，用于以连续时间方法从数据学习部分可观测系统的非马尔可夫动力学。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有动力系统学习方法常假设完整状态可访问，但实践中系统仅通过有限传感器部分观测，导致建模困难。Mori-Zwanzig形式主义提供了隐藏变量与记忆项的理论联系，激励研究者解决部分可观测性问题。该研究旨在开发一种数据高效的方法，直接学习非马尔可夫动力学，弥补现有方法的不足，摘要未明确说明更多背景细节，但强调了该挑战在现实应用中的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究引入恒定滞后神经延迟微分方程（NDDEs）框架，通过一组有限时间延迟捕获记忆效应，并使用伴随方法识别这些延迟参数。这是一种连续时间方法，能够直接从数据学习非马尔可夫动力学。验证数据集包括合成系统、混沌动力学（如Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程）和实验测量（如腔流实验）。核心创新在于结合延迟微分方程与机器学习技术，有效处理部分观测系统的建模挑战，提供非参数学习路径。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上验证了NDDEs，包括合成系统、混沌动力学和实验数据。结果表明，NDDEs在部分观测系统建模中表现优于现有方法，如长短期记忆（LSTM）网络和增强神经常微分方程（ANODEs）。摘要未提供具体性能指标，但指出比较结果有利，表明NDDEs在数据效率和准确性方面均有提升，适用于多种动力学场景，增强了部分观测系统的建模能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: NDDEs提供了一个原则性和数据高效的非马尔可夫动力学建模框架，特别适用于部分可观测系统。开源实现促进了该方法的推广和应用。研究的主要贡献在于将延迟微分方程与非参数学习结合，解决了实际建模中的关键挑战，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可能包括扩展框架以处理更复杂的系统或改进计算效率。

title: Improving Visual Object Tracking through Visual Prompting
abstract: Learning a discriminative model that distinguishes the specified target from surrounding distractors across frames is essential for generic object tracking (GOT). Dynamic adaptation of target representation against distractors remains challenging because prevailing trackers exhibit limited discriminative capability. To address this issue, we present a new visual prompting mechanism for generic object tracking, termed PiVOT. PiVOT introduces mechanisms that leverage the pretrained foundation model (CLIP) to automatically generate and refine visual prompts online, thereby enabling the tracker to suppress distractors through contrastive guidance. To transfer contrastive knowledge from the foundation model to the tracker, PiVOT automatically propagates this knowledge online and dynamically generates and updates visual prompts. Specifically, it proposes a prompt initialization mechanism that produces an initial visual prompt highlighting potential target locations. The foundation model is then used to refine the prompt based on appearance similarities between candidate objects and reference templates across potential targets. After refinement, the visual prompt better highlights potential target locations and reduces irrelevant prompt information. With the proposed prompting mechanism, the tracker can generate instance-aware feature maps guided by the visual prompts, which are incrementally and automatically updated during tracking, thereby effectively suppressing distractors. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks indicate that PiVOT, with the proposed prompting mechanism, can suppress distracting objects and improve tracking performance.
comment: This article was accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM) in 2024 and published in 2025

light_analysis.overview: 提出 PiVOT，一种基于视觉提示的机制，利用 CLIP 预训练模型在线生成和优化提示，改进通用对象跟踪，有效抑制干扰物。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用对象跟踪（GOT）的关键问题在于动态适应目标表示，以区分目标与干扰物。现有跟踪器的判别能力有限，难以在连续帧中有效应对变化，导致跟踪精度下降。这在实际应用中如视频监控和自动驾驶中尤为重要，因此本研究旨在通过引入视觉提示机制，增强跟踪器的自适应能力，克服现有方法的不足，提升跟踪的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: PiVOT 采用视觉提示机制，核心是利用预训练的基础模型 CLIP 自动生成和更新视觉提示。首先，通过提示初始化机制产生突出潜在目标位置的初始提示。接着，CLIP 基于候选对象与参考模板的外观相似性优化提示，减少无关信息。最终，生成实例感知特征图，并结合在线动态更新，确保提示能引导跟踪器有效抑制干扰物，实现目标表示的持续适应。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上进行广泛实验，结果表明 PiVOT 能够有效抑制干扰对象并提升跟踪性能。尽管摘要未明确具体数值，但与现有基线方法相比，PiVOT 在判别能力和跟踪效果上表现出显著改进，证明了其通过视觉提示机制增强跟踪鲁棒性的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了 PiVOT，一种融合视觉提示和 CLIP 预训练模型的跟踪方法，实现了动态目标表示适应。学术上，它为跟踪领域提供了新的视觉提示机制；应用上，增强了跟踪系统在复杂场景中的性能。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多基础模型或探索更广泛的干扰物处理策略，以进一步提升适用性。

title: Single Image, Any Face: Generalisable 3D Face Generation
abstract: The creation of 3D human face avatars from a single unconstrained image is a fundamental task that underlies numerous real-world vision and graphics applications. Despite the significant progress made in generative models, existing methods are either less suited in design for human faces or fail to generalise from the restrictive training domain to unconstrained facial images. To address these limitations, we propose a novel model, Gen3D-Face, which generates 3D human faces with unconstrained single image input within a multi-view consistent diffusion framework. Given a specific input image, our model first produces multi-view images, followed by neural surface construction. To incorporate face geometry information while preserving generalisation to in-the-wild inputs, we estimate a subject-specific mesh directly from the input image, enabling training and evaluation without ground-truth 3D supervision. Importantly, we introduce a multi-view joint generation scheme to enhance the appearance consistency among different views. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt and benchmark for creating photorealistic 3D human face avatars from single images for generic human subject across domains. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficacy and superiority of our method over previous alternatives for out-of-domain single image 3D face generation and the top ranking competition for the in-domain setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Gen3D-Face模型，首次实现从单个无约束图像跨域生成逼真3D人脸化身。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决从单个无约束图像生成3D人脸化身的挑战，这是许多现实世界视觉和图形应用的基础任务。现有生成模型要么设计上不适合人脸特性，要么训练域受限，导致无法有效泛化到多样化、无约束的输入图像，限制了实际部署。因此，需要一种新方法能整合几何信息并提升跨域泛化能力，以应对真实场景中的复杂面部变化。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Gen3D-Face模型，采用多视图一致扩散框架。首先，给定输入图像，模型生成多视图图像，然后通过神经表面构建创建3D人脸。关键创新包括直接从输入图像估计特定主题的网格，以整合人脸几何信息并实现无需真实3D监督的训练，同时引入多视图联合生成方案增强视图间的外观一致性。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但强调了方法的无监督特性和一致性优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在域外单图像3D人脸生成任务中表现优越，优于现有方法，并在域内设置中排名靠前。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或效率数据，但强调了方法的有效性和泛化能力，展示了其在处理无约束输入时的稳健性和高质量生成效果，与基线方法相比有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的核心贡献是首次提出并基准测试了从单个图像跨域生成逼真3D人脸化身的方法，推动了3D人脸生成领域的发展，具有重要学术和实际应用价值，如图形设计和虚拟现实。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但潜在扩展可能包括优化泛化性能或应用于其他对象类型。

title: BNEM: A Boltzmann Sampler Based on Bootstrapped Noised Energy Matching
abstract: Developing an efficient sampler capable of generating independent and identically distributed (IID) samples from a Boltzmann distribution is a crucial challenge in scientific research, e.g. molecular dynamics. In this work, we intend to learn neural samplers given energy functions instead of data sampled from the Boltzmann distribution. By learning the energies of the noised data, we propose a diffusion-based sampler, Noised Energy Matching, which theoretically has lower variance and more complexity compared to related works. Furthermore, a novel bootstrapping technique is applied to NEM to balance between bias and variance. We evaluate NEM and BNEM on a 2-dimensional 40 Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) and a 4-particle double-well potential (DW-4). The experimental results demonstrate that BNEM can achieve state-of-the-art performance while being more robust.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了BNEM，一种基于自举技术的噪声能量匹配采样器，用于波尔兹曼分布，降低了方差并提高了鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在科学研究如分子动力学中，从波尔兹曼分布生成独立同分布样本是重要挑战。现有方法通常依赖从分布中采样的数据，导致效率低下和方差问题。本方法旨在直接从能量函数学习，避免了数据依赖的局限性，以解决复杂系统中采样不充分和稳定性差的问题，从而提高采样精度和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Noised Energy Matching（NEM），一种基于扩散的神经采样器，通过学习噪声数据的能量来构建模型。关键创新在于NEM理论上具有较低方差和较高复杂度。进一步应用自举技术到NEM中形成BNEM，平衡偏差和方差，提升稳定性。实验在二维40高斯混合模型和4粒子双井势数据集上进行，用于评估采样器在复杂分布下的性能，具体神经网络架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 在二维40高斯混合模型和4粒子双井势数据集上的实验表明，BNEM达到了最先进的性能，显示出优于基线的效果。具体地，BNEM在采样效率和鲁棒性方面表现突出，实验验证了其降低方差和平衡偏差的能力。与相关方法对比，BNEM能够生成更稳定、高质量的样本，适用于科学计算任务，摘要未提供具体数值指标但强调了性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: BNEM通过结合噪声能量匹配和自举技术，有效解决了波尔兹曼分布采样中的挑战，降低了方差并提高了鲁棒性。该研究在采样器设计方面具有重要学术价值，为分子动力学等科学领域提供了高效工具。实际应用中，BNEM可促进复杂系统模拟的准确性。局限性可能在于更高维数据集的扩展性，未来工作可探索优化技术和更广泛的应用。

title: Leveraging Hallucinations to Reduce Manual Prompt Dependency in Promptable Segmentation
abstract: Promptable segmentation typically requires instance-specific manual prompts to guide the segmentation of each desired object. To minimize such a need, task-generic promptable segmentation has been introduced, which employs a single task-generic prompt to segment various images of different objects in the same task. Current methods use Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to reason detailed instance-specific prompts from a task-generic prompt for improving segmentation accuracy. The effectiveness of this segmentation heavily depends on the precision of these derived prompts. However, MLLMs often suffer hallucinations during reasoning, resulting in inaccurate prompting. While existing methods focus on eliminating hallucinations to improve a model, we argue that MLLM hallucinations can reveal valuable contextual insights when leveraged correctly, as they represent pre-trained large-scale knowledge beyond individual images. In this paper, we utilize hallucinations to mine task-related information from images and verify its accuracy for enhancing precision of the generated prompts. Specifically, we introduce an iterative Prompt-Mask Cycle generation framework (ProMaC) with a prompt generator and a mask generator.The prompt generator uses a multi-scale chain of thought prompting, initially exploring hallucinations for extracting extended contextual knowledge on a test image.These hallucinations are then reduced to formulate precise instance-specific prompts, directing the mask generator to produce masks that are consistent with task semantics by mask semantic alignment. The generated masks iteratively induce the prompt generator to focus more on task-relevant image areas and reduce irrelevant hallucinations, resulting jointly in better prompts and masks. Experiments on 5 benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of ProMaC. Code given in https://lwpyh.github.io/ProMaC/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProMaC框架，通过利用多模态大语言模型的幻觉挖掘任务相关信息，迭代优化提示和掩码，减少手动提示依赖，提升提示性分割精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 提示性分割通常需要实例特定的手动提示来指导每个对象的分割，为减少这种依赖，任务通用提示性分割被引入，使用单个通用提示分割同一任务中的不同对象图像。现有方法依赖多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）推理详细实例特定提示，但MLLMs常产生幻觉，导致提示不准确，影响分割效果。传统研究专注于消除幻觉改进模型，但本论文认为幻觉能揭示有价值的上下文洞察，因为它代表了大尺度预训练知识，超越单个图像。因此，研究动机是利用幻觉提取任务相关信息并验证其准确性，以提高提示生成的精确度，从而优化分割性能。
